Name: Kloeckner Metals - Americas
Description: Kloeckner Metals Corporation is one of the largest producer-independent distributors of steel and metal products and one of the leading steel service center companies.  As a pioneer of the digital transformation in the steel industry, Kloeckner Metals' target is to fully digitalize the supply and service chain.

Name: Olympic Steel
Description:
As a leading U.S. metals service centers, we have been safely supplying quality business solutions to customers in metal intensive industries since 1954. We sell and distribute large volumes of carbon and coated sheet, plate, and coil products; stainless steel sheet, plate, bar and coil; aluminum sheet, plate and coil; pipe, tube, valves and fittings; and tin plate, as well as metal-intensive branded products, including Wright brand self-dumping hoppers.

With our 49+ strategically located facilities in North America and a manufacturing footprint of more than 4 million square feet, we offer a full portfolio of value-added processing of flat-rolled metals including cut-to-length, temper passed, stretcher leveled, burned to shape, formed, machined, welded, painted and more.

Need metal? Contact us!

Interested in joining our team?
Olympic Steel offers a history of strength, a future of success and a world of opportunity. Since 1954, we’ve given our employees the best of both worlds: the culture and community of a closely connected team with the resources, opportunity and stability of a large, growing organization.

When you work for Olympic Steel, you’re part of a team - a team that’s guided by our Core Values and focused on continuing the safe and profitable growth of the organization. And, we offer much more than a paycheck. We provide our employees the ability to build a meaningful life-long career.
At Olympic Steel, the opportunities are endless for safety-minded, hard-working, positive thinkers who embrace accountability for achieving objectives and are committed to the success of the team.

When you work at Olympic Steel, you can make a significant impact – at our company, in the local community and in the world. See for yourself at IamOlympicSteel.com.

Join our team to learn more at https://olysteel.com/employment/.

Name: LKAB Minerals
Description:
ABOUT US
LKAB Minerals is a global supplier of industrial minerals with leading expertise across diverse applications. Working closely with our customers, we develop tailored mineral solutions designed for performance, reliability, and usability.

We are part of LKAB, the Swedish mining group and one of the world’s foremost producers of upgraded iron ore products and mining services.

GLOBAL REACH
With operations across Europe, North America, and Asia, we support industries ranging from civil engineering and water treatment to paints, polymers, and cosmetics. Our services include blending, mixing, and custom formulations to meet specific customer requirements.

OUR VALUES
Our work is guided by three values: Committed, Innovative, and Responsible. These principles drive our passion for delivering value and building long-term partnerships.

GROWTH & INNOVATION
LKAB’s Special Products Division, which includes LKAB Minerals, is focused on creating value beyond iron ore. This includes developing solutions for mining, construction, and a wide range of industrial applications.

Our growth strategy combines organic expansion, innovation, and acquisitions, with a strong focus on advancing technologies and broadening our mineral offering.

CONTACT
 Website: www.lkabminerals.com
 Global Offices: lkabminerals.com/contact
 News & Insights: lkabminerals.com/news

Name: DITH
Description:
DITH - Duferco International Trading Holding is a global leader in the trading and distribution of steel and the raw materials essential to steel production.

We operate from 60 global locations worldwide and enjoy commercial relationships with over 49,000 customers in 106 countries through our trading, distribution and production activities.

We are active across the entire steel value chain and while trading is central to all our activities, the production and distribution units are cornerstones of the business model.

Our global presence and strength in structured trade finance allows us to provide vital value-added logistics and financial solutions to all sectors of the industrial supply chain.

From construction to shipbuilding, white goods, automotive, mining and energy production, DITH is fully integrated into all the principal steel intensive industries – and able to deliver virtually the entire spectrum of steel products whenever and wherever needed.

Since inception, DITH’s growth has been powered by the successful implementation of a simple strategy based on maintaining long term strategic partnerships and an innovative business model.

Our long-term sustainability is dependent on being able to consistently evolve to meet the realities of a rapidly changing global market place and continuing to cater to the high expectations of customers and suppliers which, in turn, reflect the growing needs of societies and economies around the world.

Our business practices are underpinned by empirical principles and strong ethical values. We continually strive to ensure that commercial integrity and respect for different cultures takes precedence in our daily approach to business.

Name: Vulcan
Description:
Since Vulcan's doors first opened in 1995, Vulcan Steel has been on a mission to shake up the steel and metal industry. Our goal? To be the go-to metals distributor for customers across Australia and New Zealand, offering the best service and top-notch products.

Vulcan has broadened its product offerings to include a diverse range of steel and metal products, from carbon steel to stainless steel, and everything in between, such as plate processing, coil processing, engineering steels, and aluminium. Our unwavering commitment to reliable service has driven our growth both organically and through the acquisition of well-established businesses. With over 70 branches throughout Australia and New Zealand and 1400+ employees across six business divisions, we are a leading force in the industry. Our extensive product range is used in every aspect of the economy, from the tiniest components in high-tech applications to large infrastructure and building projects.

Customer satisfaction is at the forefront of our priorities, and this is reflected in our consistently high Delivery in Full on Time (DIFOT) score in the high 90s. Our inventory levels are meticulously managed to ensure our customers always have access to the products they need. Our employees are empowered to make quick decisions in response to customer needs, and our transportation fleet, and quality products with traceability are just a few reasons why our customers trust us.

We have a unique non-hierarchical, single-status culture where everyone is encouraged and empowered to make their own decisions. This is a rare point of difference within our industry and a cultural foundation we're proud to maintain as we continue to grow. This flat structure keeps our business agile, efficient and extremely responsive and promotes a culture where all employees feel trusted, valued and fulfilled.

In 2022, Vulcan Steel took its place on the Australian Stock Exchange (ASX) and the New Zealand Stock Exchange (NZX).

Name: American Battery Technology Company
Description:
American Battery Technology Company champions environmental and ethical sourcing of critical battery materials through lithium-ion battery recycling, battery metal extraction technologies, and primary mineral resource development for use in the batteries that power electric cars, grid storage applications, and consumer electronics and tools. 

NASDAQ: ABAT

Name: DJJ-The David J Joseph Company
Description: The David J. Joseph Company (DJJ), founded in 1885, is a world leader in scrap metal recycling & trading. With over 70 locations, the Joseph Company is headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio and is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Nucor Corporation (NUE) a Fortune 150 Company. DJJ has a well-earned reputation for safety, integrity and innovation. We are recognized as a good community citizen who is trustworthy, financially strong and environmentally proactive.

Name: Eastern Metal Supply, Inc.
Description:
At EMS, we are committed to DELIVERING MORE—innovation, value and solutions to meet the evolving needs of our customers. Guided by our Vision to be the Preferred and Most Trusted Resource for High-Quality Aluminum Product Solutions, we empower industries with the aluminum products and expertise they need to thrive.
With strategically located distribution centers and advanced capabilities, we provide fast, reliable service across markets like construction, transportation, marine, and custom fabrication. Our extensive inventory and value-added services drive our partners' success.
As industry leaders, we embrace new technologies, sustainable practices, and forward-thinking strategies. We focus on building long-term partnerships by understanding customer needs and delivering tailored solutions.
At EMS, we’re not just aluminum suppliers—we’re partners in progress, ready to help you succeed now and in the future.

Markets Include: 
Sign & Exhibit; Awning & Shade; Shutters; Fence, Railing & Gates; Patio & Pool; Dock & Deck; Marine Products; Boat Lifts & Trailers; Cargo, Truck & Body; Window Treatments; Construction, Window & Doors and More! 

Featuring a full line of Standard Aluminum Extrusions, Sheet & Plate products and Custom Extrusion capabilities.

We also provide Machining & Fabrication Services.  
Capabilities include:
• CNC Centers (Mills/Lathes)
• Shearing
• Precision cutting (12"-50')
• Punching
• Deburring
• Drilling
• Tapping
• Assembly/Welding
• Roll Forming
• Beveling/Chamfering
• Bending
• Sanding
• Anodizing
• Powder Coat Paint
• Design Assistance (R & D)

For more information including our online product catalog, credit applications and more, visit our website: www.EasternMetal.com

Name: Armco do Brasil S.A.
Description:
A Armco do Brasil S.A. é uma empresa de capital nacional com unidades fabris em São Paulo e Amazonas, líder na produção de aços relaminados de baixo, médio e alto carbono, aços ligados, inoxidáveis e revestidos.

O Grupo Armco engloba as melhores soluções em metais e um dos mixes mais completos de produtos da América Latina. São mais de 100 anos de experiência, produzindo aço com qualidade e inovação.

Cada empresa do Grupo Armco está preparada para oferecer um serviço de qualidade ímpar, atendendo de forma integral todas as demandas dos nossos clientes. Confira o que o Grupo Armco pode fazer pela sua empresa.

Name: E3 Lithium
Description: E3 Lithium is a lithium resource and technology company aiming to power the growing electrical revolution. Based in Alberta, E3 Lithium has Canada’s largest high-confidence lithium resource hosted in the world-class Leduc Aquifer. E3 Lithium has the potential to deliver high-purity, battery-grade lithium products to market from one of the best jurisdictions in the world. As part of E3’s vision for a brighter energy future, we plan to deliver our lithium products with reduced carbon emissions, while using less than 3% of the land of typical lithium projects, with no tailings or evaporative ponds.

Name: THE BHARAT STEEL GROUP
Description:
Started in 1989 with Iron and steel Trading and now into Foray of steel solutions of Steel Trading, Roofing solution and Turnkey PEB contractors

Authorised Distributors of SAIL/JSW & RINL for its Flat & Long steel products
Authorised Distributor of JSW Colouron+ roofing sheet and Manufacturers of C/Z Purlins
Turnkey Contracts for Pre Engineered Buildings & Civil Needs

Name: Krogman Metals BV
Description:
Krogman Metals BV is a stockist and global trader of stainless steel long & flat products. Our speciality being prime and second quality, assures us to provide our international clients any possibility to their demands.

From our headquarter in The Netherlands, we trade within more than 30 countries. 
We add value and trust to our partners by being their key connection point to some of the worlds leading producers of stainless steel.
With the wide range of  products in different finishes and qualities, Krogman Metals is the ideal global partner for companies that develop finished products and solutions in various market sectors. Above all, we ensure to help our partners move forward.


Mission of Krogman Metals is to play an important role in the success of our customers. 

Understanding and helping customers ensuring us to bond towards each other. Making their manufacturing process much easier by delivering our services and materials on time with the best quality attached to it.

This is a fact we have proven for the last years, whereby our worldwide clients have become our partners.

Name: Metals USA
Description:
Metals USA Plates and Shapes offers a wide range of carbon steel, aluminum, and stainless-steel products while providing our customers with world class processing services and custom solutions. Our network of industry leading service centers is located near to strategic manufacturing and population hubs across the United States.
Through strong relationships with steel mills and manufacturers, Metals USA is able to provide quality products and services that our customers can depend upon. From the smallest businesses to the largest fabricators and OEMs, Metals USA is expertly positioned to be your provider of choice.

Name: MCB
Description: MCB has been supplying metal for 80 years. We are the metal wholesaler that understands your business. Our people-oriented approach guarantees loyalty and trust in cooperation. Characterised by a broad and deep product range in steel, stainless steel, aluminium and non-ferrous. But above all, we help our partners move forward. With improvement, innovation, ambition and growth. With an open and sharp mind, we penetrate to the core of our partners' business. That understanding ensures connection. Only this way of working makes it possible to get our advice, services and products right down to the last millimetre.

Name: Mill Steel Company
Description:
Mill Steel Co., based in Grand Rapids, MI, and ranked in the Top 50 Metal Service Centers, remains dedicated to its history of innovation and people-first culture. Mill Steel operates six service center locations including Grand Rapids and Melvindale, MI, Mansfield, OH, Jeffersonville, IN, Birmingham, AL, and Houston, TX. Mill Steel serves customers in the automotive, construction, appliance, and agricultural equipment industries.

Mill Steel is ranked as one of the best places to work in Michigan and has received several prestigious awards including the Alfred P. Sloan Award for business excellence in workplace flexibility by the U.S. Chamber of Commerce as well as the 101 Best and Brightest Companies in West Michigan. The company continues to practice its history of excellence as it grows to meet the needs of an expanding customer base.

Name: SunCoke Energy Brasil
Description:
SunCoke, a energia que transforma o nosso futuro para melhor.

Atuamos na produção de coque, uma das matérias-primas para a produção do aço, e somos a primeira coqueria heat recovery no Brasil. Essa tecnologia consiste em recuperar o calor dos fornos de carvão e transformá-lo em energia. Com 320 fornos, oito caldeiras e uma central termelétrica, a SunCoke Energy Brasil é uma das maiores coquerias do país, com produção anual de mais de 1,5 milhão de toneladas de coque, que resultam na geração de 160 MW de energia.

A empresa faz parte do grupo SunCoke Energy e possui contrato de Tecnologia, Operação e Manutenção com a ArcelorMittal Brasil.

Name: Fabrimetal Sénégal
Description:
Créé en 2006, le groupe MMD est un acteur incontournable de la sidérurgie en Afrique Subsaharienne. Fort de ses unités de production et de négoce en République Démocratique du Congo, au Rwanda, en Angola, au Ghana, au Burkina Faso, au Mali, MMD Steel s’installe aujourd’hui au Sénégal, à travers sa filiale Fabrimetal Sénégal. 

MMD Steel ce sont plusieurs décennies   d’expérience dans la production de fer à béton TMT, en Afrique Subsaharienne. Nous avons acquis, au fil des années, les compétences techniques et le savoir-faire nécessaires à la production d’armatures aux normes internationales. Nous nous efforçons de dépasser les attentes de nos clients, en termes de qualité et de compétitivité de nos produits. 

MMD Steel s’investit également dans la fourniture de services à valeur ajoutée. Aussi nous mettons à votre disposition des prestations additionnelles, permettant de répondre à vos problématiques d’emballage, de stockage, et même d’expédition à l’international. Vos enjeux sont les nôtres !
C’est avec fierté que nous nous sommes implantés aujourd’hui au Sénégal, avec pour objectif de fournir le meilleur du fer à béton TMT sur le marché sénégalais. Nos moteurs au quotidien : • la qualité de notre fer à béton TMT • la sécurité, la formation de nos collaborateurs • le respect et la protection de notre environnement

Name: Triple-S Steel Holdings, Inc.
Description: Triple-S Steel is one of the nation’s largest family-owned steel service center organizations, with more than 50 locations across North America and Colombia. We offer structural steel, tubing, specialty metals, and value-added processing services to customers serving the construction, manufacturing, and infrastructure markets.

Name: Vanilla Steel
Description:
Vanilla Steel is your trading partner for excess and prime metals.

Unlock the full potential of the European steel market with tailored offers and material lists delivered straight to your inbox.

Keep your current workflows and access a vast network of 500+ suppliers and 3000+ buyers across Europe, all through a single trading partner.

*** Co-funded by the European Union ***

Supported by co-financing from the European Union, Vanilla Steel is also developing Smart Forecaster, a price and demand forecasting algorithm for prime and excess steel, with the aim of automatically predicting the future development of price and demand for steel using artificial intelligence.

Name: SELECTARC WELDING & BRAZING
Description:
We are a French manufacturer of innovative welding and brazing products, a significant operator in the international market. The quality of our products and services and our highly focused Research & Development have, over the years, made the group a benchmarck among the largest worldwide manufacturers. 
 
 Now present on all continents through our subsidiaries and partners, the family business has successfully expanded to offer one of the widest ranges of welding and brazing products on the market. Our have a particularly strong presence in specific, very technical markets and in industrial sectors with high added value such as aeronautics, ground transport, oil and gaz, nuclear power,  chemicals and petrochemicals.

Name: Industrial Metal Supply Co.
Description:
Industrial Metal Supply Company (IMS) is a full line metal distributor serving the needs of metal users throughout California and Arizona since 1948. Now over seventy years old, IMS is renowned for an extensive inventory, robust production capabilities and exceptional customer service. 

Our product line includes a long list of metals in various alloys, shapes, and sizes; specialty and decorative metals; as well as a large selection of metalworking tools and supplies. 

In addition to the extensive online selection, IMS services its customers from seven locations, open six days a week. Each location offers a Will-Call center and a store which allows the company to offer same day service, along with a fleet of 40 trucks providing next day delivery.

Our customers consistently tell us that the personal, responsive service and presentation IMS offers is unlike any other in the metal business, and it’s what keeps them coming back year after year. Every IMS employee has a single focus and that is to save our customers time — it’s the most valuable asset we can give them, so we do, everyday.

Name: BIKAR METALS
Description:
Our facts:
3rd generation family business | >980 employees | 60 junior staff | +25,000 customers in 150 countries | 27 locations worldwide | 120,000 m² of space | 100,000 tonnes of storage capacity
 
Our core business:
With our dedicated employees, we supply companies in various industries worldwide with aluminium, brass, copper, bronze, plastics and special alloys in the form of sheets, plates, blanks, rods, profiles and tubes.
 
Our locations:
BIKAR METALS headquarters in Bad Berleburg-Raumland | BIKAR AEROSPACE in Korbußen | production site in Bristol (UK) | production site in Belagavi (India) | 8 sales offices throughout Germany | 4 locations and numerous sales offices around the world | 4 IT offices
 
Our vision:
Since the company was founded, BIKAR METALS has invested in the latest technologies and the further development of the business segment. This path also determines our future.
With the BIKAR ZONE, we have developed a worldwide unique, fully automated cutting centre and thus automated the production of non-standardised blanks in the manner of series production and optimised our production of semi-finished products and blanks from aluminium rolled sheets economically and ecologically.
 
Our philosophy:
Every single employee in our company bears responsibility for quality, safety and environmental protection, as well as continuous improvement. We also encourage our partners to adopt our high standards. We create mutual trust through open and continuous dialogue with our employees, customers, suppliers, authorities, neighbours and the public. We sensitise our employees through training and further education and enable them to successfully implement our principles of action. Our self-commitment and principles are an expression of our values.

Imprint: https://www.bikar.com/en_US/imprint
Data rotection: https://www.bikar.com/en_US/data-protection

Name: Metal Supermarkets
Description:
Our metal distribution centers specialize in the distribution of all types, shapes, sizes, and grades of metal. We stock and sell aluminum, hot- and cold-rolled steel, stainless steel, brass and copper bar-in-bar, tubes, channel and sheet-processed to our customer's exact specifications, ready fast with no minimum order. 

The Metal Supermarkets brand is known for superior customer care from start to finish and the highest-quality metal products available. Customers include manufacturing facilities, maintenance departments, tool and die makers, fabricators, machine shops, military and other government departments, hobbyists, and homeowners. 

We are passionate about our customers, products, service, and franchisees. Metal Supermarkets is a dependable business model, a trusted international brand name and a lucrative franchise opportunity.

Name: Marmon/Keystone LLC
Description:
For current job openings, visit www.MarmonKeystone.com

A leading wholesale distributor of tubular products for over 100 years, Marmon/Keystone inventories more than 15,000 sizes and grades of carbon, alloy, stainless and aluminum tubular and bar products. Marmon/Keystone also offers a full range of value added services to enhance manufacturing needs. Service centers and sales offices are located throughout North America, with corporate headquarters in Butler, Pennsylvania.

Marmon/Keystone LLC and affiliated businesses are Marmon Distribution Services/Berkshire Hathaway companies and members of The Marmon Group, an international association of approximately 150 business units that operate independently within diverse business sectors.

Name: Amapá.ind
Description:
Somos uma indústria brasileira, com sede em Cláudio, MG, e clientes em todos os estados e diversos países.

Todo empresário, pequeno, médio ou grande, que quer montar ou ampliar um negócio e precisa de soluções para armazenagem, organização e exposição de produtos, pode contar com a gente. Com nossos produtos e soluções ajudamos o comércio a acontecer, ajudamos o Brasil a crescer. Em cada negócio, nossos produtos conectam a oferta com a demanda, pessoas e negócios. Somos parceiros para uma boa experiência de compra. 

Aqui apoiamos o sonho empreendedor de milhares de brasileiros.

Conheça nossa Ideologia e Política do Sistema de Gestão Integrada: https://amapa.ind.br/a-amapa

Name: voestalpine High Performance Metals USA
Description:
In its business segments, voestalpine is a globally leading technology and capital goods group with a unique combination of material and processing expertise. voestalpine has around 500 Group companies and locations in more than 50 countries on all five continents.

In the United States, voestalpine was formally known as Bohler-Uddeholm and is known as a steel backed technology company and the leading company in the United States for Specialty Steel, Coatings, Machining Services and Technical Support. 

voestalpine is one of the World’s leading manufacturers of high-quality tool steel, high-speed steel, powder metallurgical steels, stainless steels, and specialty alloys. We strive to exceed our customers’ expectations by supplying the most technologically advanced materials and value added services for their applications. 

Our products and conveniently located facilities are supported by a highly trained technical sales force and by a local and international metallurgical support staff.

Name: Central Steel & Wire
Description: Central Steel & Wire Company distributes, processes, and fabricates ferrous and nonferrous metals. We apply our experience, insight, and ideas to optimize your supply chain performance for sustained competitive advantage. You can browse our inventory using our online stock list, request mill test reports, access several useful calculators and conversion tables, and review our broad array of processing capabilities – all directly from our website: www.centralsteel.com. Central Steel & Wire offers the materials, capabilities, and PROVEN programs to lower your metals supply cost.

Name: Langley Alloys
Description:
Langley Alloys is a leading stockist and distributor of high-performance, corrosion-resistant alloys, supporting global industries from our UK and US facilities.

Established in 1938, we hold one of the largest ranges of duplex, super duplex, nickel and copper alloys in stock — including our proprietary Ferralium 255 and Hiduron.

As distribution partners of Alleima and voestalpine BOHLER Edelstahl, we offer an exceptional portfolio of advanced stainless steels and alloys.

Our in-house testing, inspection and machining capabilities, backed by experienced metallurgists and over 2,000 specifications on record, make us a trusted one-stop supplier for demanding applications.

Name: Earle M. Jorgensen Company
Description: EMJ is a leading supplier of Steel and Aluminum Bar, Tubing, and Plate to manufacturing companies in North America and around the world. Our broad network of facilities, superior inventories, extensive value-added processing capabilities, and world-class technology enables EMJ to provide unsurpassed service to our customers.

Name: Altilium Clean Technology
Description:
http://www.altilium.tech

Altilium is a UK based Clean Technology group decarbonising the electric vehicle supply chain and supporting the transformation of the global energy sector from fossil-based to zero-carbon. 

By recycling existing waste streams, such as old EV batteries and mine waste, we will supply domestic, sustainable and  low carbon critical mineral to a battery supply chain.

Name: Steel and Pipe Supply
Description:
Steel and Pipe Supply Company, Inc. distributes high-quality carbon steel to customers across the Midwest. We keep a large inventory in multiple warehouses, provide value-added processing services, and maintain a strong distribution network — all to help our customers get the steel they need quickly, efficiently, and at a competitive price.

We have warehousing and processing facilities optimally located in and around:
•	Houston, TX
•	Longview, TX
•	Tulsa, OK
•	St. Louis, MO
•	Kansas City, KS

After over 80 years in business, we continue to evolve and innovate in service to our customers and our employees. We take pride in providing our customers with an outstanding product and a superior experience every step of the way, thanks to our hard-working, dedicated family of employees.

Name: INTOCO - Duplex Steels & Nickel Alloys
Description:
Intoco - Duplex Steels & Nickel Alloys (ISO 9001:2015 accredited)
Registered in England No 01060362

As a responsible and respected steel distribution organisation, Intoco recognise the importance of the ability to supply raw and pre machined materials that can be relied on in terms of:

•	Quality
•	Traceability
•	Rapid delivery

Intoco has in adopting and maintaining these critical requirements, expanded to become one of the largest independent stockist and distributor of specialised raw materials in Europe. Based in the UK we are able to ship our steel to worldwide destinations by road, sea or air freight usually with immediate delivery due to our policy of maintaining high stock levels over a vast array of sizes.

Our client portfolio includes customers engaged in Aerospace, Fastener, Motorsports, Marine, Oil & Gas, Sub-sea Energy, Wind Energy, Pharmaceutical and Metal Extrusion, who have exacting requirements for our specialist steels including:-

•	DUPLEX STAINLESS STEEL
	(UNS S31803 / F51 & F60 / 1.4462 / 2205)

•	SUPER DUPLEX STAINLESS STEEL
	(UNS32760 / F55 / 1.4501 / 25Cr80 & UNS 32750 / F53 / 1.4410 / 25Cr80)

•	AUSTENITIC STAINLESS STEEL
	(904L / 1.4539, 316L / 1.4404/1)
        (NIT/INTEGREX 50 ANNEALED & HIGH STRENGTH, NIT/INTEGREX 60 ANNEALED)   

•	SUPER AUSTENITIC STAINLESS STEEL
	(UNS S31254 / F44 / 1.4547)

•	MARTENSITIC STAINLESS STEEL
	(1.4125 / 440C to AMS5630)

•	PRECIPITATION HARDENING STAINLESS STEEL
	(17-4PH - CONDITION A, H900, H1025, H1150D)

•	NICKEL ALLOYS
	(ALLOY C276, A286, 400, K500, 625)
        (ALLOY 718 to API 6A and AMS 5662 & 5663)

In addition to our in-house stock range, we maintain strong partnerships with other trusted stockholders, allowing us to source non-core and specialist grades quickly and competitively when required

Our materials come with EN 10204 certification and are fully traceable.

Name: Sverdrup Steel
Description:
Sverdrup Steel is a global supplier of stainless steel. 

We have more than 30 years of experience and in-depth expertise in materials technology, offering a wide range of steel processing services, stainless steel and high performance alloys in flat and long products.

We stock a broad range of materials in compliance with NORSOK and IOGP requirements, ready for next-day dispatch from our global service centers. We are proud to say that we are ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 approved.

Name: BE Group
Description: BE Group is a leading independent steel distributor that stores and processes steel, stainless steel, and aluminium for customers primarily in the construction and manufacturing industries. Through the company's production services, customers can order customized steel components to optimize their production processes. The company's largest markets are Sweden and Finland. The headquarters is located in Malmö.

Name: Van Leeuwen Netherlands
Description: Van Leeuwen in the Netherlands consists of Van Leeuwen Pipe and Tube in Zwijndrecht, Van Leeuwen Precision in Deventer and Van Leeuwen Stainless in Beesd. Each company has its own specialism regarding carbon steel, stainless steel or precision products. Together we help companies in all markets with our complementary product and service portfolio.

Name: Carl Spaeter Gruppe
Description:
Stahl ist unser Ding. Seit über 140 Jahren, international, landesweit und lokal. Wir sind eines der 500 umsatzstärksten Unternehmen in Deutschland und nutzen unsere Größe, um unseren Kunden ihre Wünsche zu erfüllen. Denn wir finden: Wenn man sich sicher ist, das Richtige zu tun, dann muss man es auch richtig tun.

Zu uns gehören sowohl internationale Gesellschaften als auch lokale Spezialisten, die Sie mit Namen kennen. Wir sind ein Großunternehmen und gleichzeitig Mittelständler. Das ist uns wichtig. Denn sowohl Generalisten als auch Spezialisten gibt es viele, doch wir sind beides gleichzeitig. Dadurch können wir tun, was wir tun.

Persönliche Nähe zählt besonders, wenn es hart auf hart kommt. Denn dann brauchen Sie jemanden, auf den Sie sich hundertprozentig verlassen können und der einen kühlen Kopf bewahrt. Wenn es darauf ankommt, sind wir da. In diesen Momenten bringen uns unsere Kunden viel Vertrauen entgegen. Das bedeutet uns viel. 

Datenschutz: https://www.spaeter.de/datenschutz
Impressum: https://www.spaeter.de/impressum

Name: Van Leeuwen Buizen Zwijndrecht
Description:
Van Leeuwen Pipe and Tube in Zwijndrecht is a stock keeping and distributing company of pipes, tubes, fittings and flanges in carbon steel, duplex and super duplex. We supply our material to virtually all kinds of industries, from steel construction and mechanical engineering companies to customers active in pipeline and process industry business.

Our strategic goal to improve the sustainability of the steel sector has alreasy led to significant measures. With 9.100 solar panels on the roof of our warehouses we generate our own electrical power. Our trucks use HVO100 biodiesel and our internal transportation as well as our lease fleet has almost been fully electrified. Moreover, together with leading producers we are building a stock of pipe and tube products made of CO2 reduced steel. We sell this product line under our own umbrella brand "Van Leeuwen Impact".

Name: Cascadia Metals
Description: Cascadia Metals is a leading distributor of coil and sheet metal products. We offer solutions for any project such as cut-to-length, slitting, and in-line slearing. With our vast inventories of steel, aluminum, copper, and zinc, we are your go-to reliable source for metal. Connect with our team to learn more!

Name: Hadco Metal Trading Co.,LLC
Description:
Hadco Metal Trading is a well-respected service center that specializes in the distribution of semifinished metals and plastics throughout the United States. Our business model centers around our extensive inventory, which boasts an impressive collection of over 20,000 distinct items. In addition to our wide-ranging selection, we pride ourselves on our efficient delivery service. It allows us to serve as a one-stop shop for our customers' “just-in-time” needs and offer next day delivery in the majority of areas.

Strategically located in key locations across the country — New York, Pennsylvania, Connecticut, Florida, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Georgia, Oklahoma, Kansas, Texas, Arizona, Oregon, Washington, and California. Our branches ensure that we can efficiently meet the needs of our diverse customer base. We understand the importance of precision and offer a comprehensive range of high precision cutting equipment that guarantees exact cuts regardless of the alloy, shape, or size required. Within our branches, customers will find band saws, disc saws, stone plate saws, and shears, all ideal for cutting plates, sheets, and long products.

Quality is an absolute priority in all Hadco operations, reflected in our ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D certifications. In addition to our commitment to quality, we provide our customers with a range of value-added services. This includes a wide variety of stock, ensuring that customers have ample options to choose from, as well as the assurance of exceptional quality and timely delivery at a competitive value.

At Hadco Metal Trading, we strive to deliver exceptional products and services to our customers, with a steadfast focus on reliability, precision, and customer satisfaction.

Name: Corrosion Materials
Description:
We are the largest stocking distributor of Ni alloy wrought products in the world with manufacturing capabilities.

Corrosion Materials has been supplying corrosion resistant alloys for 60 years and has developed the resources, skills and inventory to satisfy the demanding needs of a multitude of markets. Corrosion Materials’ commitment to quality is reflected in our ISO 9001 Certification, our knowledgeable quality control staff, and our employees who understand our customer’s requirements and are dedicated to handling customer’s orders quickly, efficiently and accurately.

We carry an extensive inventory of alloy plate, sheets, bar, seamless and welded pipe, flanges, fittings, tubing, fasteners, coil, and forgings.  Our welding products come in a variety of forms including: coated electrodes, MIG & TIG wire. We offer virtually any kind of custom corrosion resistant alloy profile that you can design from a variety of manufacturing methods to choose from such as: forming, laser fusion, hot rolling, cold rolling, cold drawing, and extrusions. From non-standard square and rectangular tubing to wide flange beams, channels, angles and completely custom near net shapes in our alloys.

Our services include High Definition Plasma cutting and beveling, CNC precision machining, abrasive and band sawing, shearing, welding, water-jet cutting, heat treating, and a wide variety of testing.

Corrosion Materials’ commitment to service is recognized worldwide.

Sustainability is a core part of our philosophy. We believe that acting responsibly today is key to securing a livable future. While the EU targets climate neutrality by 2050, we aim to achieve it by 2040. 

 

thyssenkrupp Materials Trading is part of the Distribution & Trading business unit of thyssenkrupp Materials Services. With an annual turnover of 2.2 billion euros and a shipping volume of 3,4 tons (2023/24), we are a reliable partner for companies worldwide. Trust our expertise and commitment to the highest quality and excellent service.

Name: Minerals Compliance and Advisory Agency - MCAA
Description:
MCAA is an independent private-sector facilitation body based in Accra, Ghana. Our mission is to support regulatory efficiency, stakeholder education, and investment facilitation in Ghana’s minerals and small-scale mining ecosystem.

Vision:
To become the leading facilitation and advisory institution that ensures all mining activities in Ghana are legally compliant, ethically executed, and globally attractive to responsible investors.

Mission:
To work collaboratively with the Minerals Commission and other regulatory bodies to simplify access to mining licenses, promote lawful mining practices, and serve as a strategic platform for engagement between government,
communities, and investors.

Ghana’s mining sector continues to be a major contributor to the national economy. However, the complexity of regulatory requirements, combined with
misinformation, limited stakeholder education, and rising illegal mining activities, has created a gap in compliance and accessibility; especially in the small-scale mining sector.

There is a growing need for:
• A trusted intermediary to bridge communication and compliance gaps.
• Investor guidance to reduce risks and ensure adherence to Ghana’s laws.
• Structured education and support for small-scale miners, foreign investors, and local stakeholders on environmental, legal, and social obligations.

Name: Pontubos - Tubos e Hastes de Aço
Description:
Desde 1992, a Pontubos oferece soluções completas em tubos de aço trefilados, hastes retificadas cromadas e ferro fundido nodular, aliando qualidade certificada a prazos de entrega competitivos. Atendemos indústrias hidráulicas, pneumáticas e estruturais em todo o Brasil, fornecendo peças cortadas sob medida, lotes flexíveis e suporte consultivo em cada etapa do projeto.

Portfólio de produtos:
• Tubos sem costura trefilados H8 e para ligação hidráulica
• Tubos com costura trefilados H9
• Hastes retificadas cromadas (convencionais e temperadas por indução)
• Ferro fundido nodular para tampas, êmbolos e componentes de precisão

Serviços especializados: brunimento centesimal, corte sob medida e usinagem de tubos, garantindo acabamento interno Ra < 0,40 µm, concentricidade ≤ 3 % e peças prontas para montagem.

Compromisso: precisão, resistência e confiabilidade em cada fornecimento. Somos revendedores Vallourec, trabalhamos apenas com materiais certificados e movemos mais de 300 mil toneladas/ano em produtos para sistemas hidráulicos de alta performance. Conte com a Pontubos para reduzir lead times, evitar desperdícios e elevar o padrão dos seus projetos.

Name: AVANI INTERNATIONAL BV
Description:
Avani International handles both the recycling of ferrous and non-ferrous metals. By ferrous we mean all possible types of iron. Examples of non-ferrous metals include copper, lead, aluminum, etc these ferrous and non-ferrous metals are prepared for further recycling after collection. These are then transported by truck or barge to recycling factories in and outside Europe.

We handle millions of tonnes of ferrous material each year; everything from a toaster to an aircraft carrier. We accept both light iron from domestic and household use and all grades of heavy iron from construction, demolition, manufacturing and a diverse number of other sectors. Globally, we buy over 100 different grades of non-ferrous metals. We also buy complex scrap that contains different metal types which are combined, as well as non-metallic items that contain metal. Our team of non-ferrous specialists can quickly identify what you’re supplying and offer you a competitive price.

We recycle, such as size reduction, dismantling, sorting, cutting, cutting, grinding. You can also have your surplus materials destroyed with us, so that they do not come into circulation again. In addition, Avani International BV also collects all ferrous, non-ferrous metals, as well as your scrap

We form an indispensable part of the circular circle by providing a full-service solution. We collect, distribute, separate, sort, and process ferrous and non-ferrous materials as well as electronics. With our frontrunner position, 10 years of experience and national coverage, we put recycling into a higher gear. Our teams of hands-on people value sustainability in client relationships and operational execution. We make a real impact by striving for the most efficient, innovative and sustainable working methods. Every offered solution for processing discarded remnants is custom, and no request is too complex. We can always offer fitting solutions to serve the interest of all stakeholders – with operational excellence

Name: Flats Service srl
Description:
Flats Service s.r.l., created in January 2000, offers precision manufacturing services, i.e. high-speed cutting and precision cutting of both steel and aluminium blocks that are used in building valve bodies and special blocks for hydraulic industry.

Flats Service s.r.l. provides its customers with a cut, chamfered, milled to size and marked block, which will be shipped on its own pallet. In order to offer this kind of service, Flats Service s.r.l. installed a high-performance cutting line that includes both band and disc saw machines.

Flats Service s.r.l. offers a great variety of stock Leaded free-cutting steel bars (11SMnPb30 / 11SmnPb37 UNI EN 10277-3 2008) – flat and square – both drawn and machined.
Moreover, Flats Service s.r.l. stock materials include a great variety of flat and square bars in both Aluminium alloy 2011 EN AW (AlCu6BiPb UNI EN 573-3) and Aluminium alloy 7020 EN AW (AlZn4,5Mg1 UNI EN 573-3).

In 2013, Flats Service s.r.l. installed a shot/sand blasting system in order to properly clean the surface of cut blocks. This shot/sand blasting activity allows to visually check every single cut block and discard the block presenting surface cracks and imperfections.

In order to meet any kind of need, Flats Service s.r.l. supplies cut blocks in other kinds of ferrous and non-ferrous materials at the customer’s request.

Thanks to its long experience in hydraulic industry, Flats Service s.r.l. has acquired a considerable client portfolio by meeting the requirements of Companies that are leaders in the production of valve bodies and special blocks for hydraulic industry.

In 2012, Flats Service s.r.l. has been awarded with UNI EN ISO 9001:2008 Certification.

The beach sand at Pulmoddai is very rich in valuble minerals namly ,Ilmenite,Rutile,Zircon,Monazite,Garnet and Silimanite with a percentage of 40-50% heavy minerals of wich 70% is Ilmenite,6% Rutile and 10% Zircon it has been estimated that a totla quantity of 16.6% million tones of  unexploited valuable mineral sands are available in and arround Pulmoddai.
THe plant at Pulmoddai has an annual capacity to produce 75,000 tones of Ilmenite.5,000 tones of Rutile and 3,750.00 tones of Zircon.
Further Lanka MIneral Sands Limited is planing to establish a Mineral Sands processing plant at Kokilai in 2022-2023 at Northern province of Sri Lanka in Mulathiw District with an Annual capacity to produce 125,000 tones of Ilmenite 5,000 tones of Rutile 3,750 tones of Zircon.

Description:
Green Ferro Alloy (FZC) LLC was founded by a team of engineers, entrepreneurs, and academics with several decades of experience in ferroalloy production. We are preparing to open Oman’s first silicon metal facility in the Sohar Freezone.

In June 2023, we received our operating license from the Government of the Sultanate of Oman, and in July 2023, we signed a land lease agreement with Sohar Port and Freezone Authority (SPFA). The project will run in two phases, each set to produce 25,000 tonnes of silicon metal per year. Phase One starts in the second quarter of 2026.

We chose the Sohar Freezone for its deep-water port, efficient logistics, and business-friendly rules. This location will help us deliver high-purity silicon metal quickly to Europe, Asia, and North America.

By combining proven smelting methods with modern process-control systems, Green Ferro Alloy will produce silicon metal that meets—and aims to exceed—the strict quality standards of aluminum smelters, specialty alloy and chemical producers, and solar panel and semiconductor manufacturers worldwide.

Name: Elementa Global Trading Co., Ltd.
Description:
Elementa Global Trading is a premier supplier of strategic minerals and industrial raw materials, bridging the gap between Southeast Asia’s (ASEAN) resource-rich zones and the global market.

Headquartered in Thailand with a strategic office in Turkey, we operate a fully integrated supply chain model. Unlike traditional brokerages, we manage the process from source extraction and quality verification to international logistics and final delivery. This "boots-on-the-ground" approach allows us to mitigate operational risks and guarantee consistent specifications for industrial buyers.

Technical Portfolio & Sourcing:

1. Antimony (Sb):

Ore & Concentrates: Sourced directly from varying geological deposits (3% - 50%).

Ingots: High-purity grades (99.65% min) with strictly controlled impurity levels (As, Pb) for battery, flame retardant, and metallurgy sectors.

2. Copper (Cu):

Ore: Direct shipping ore (DSO) ranging from ~0.8% to ~8% Cu.

Concentrates: Smelter-ready grades (~20% - 35% Cu) tailored to processing requirements.

3. Strategic Tech Metals:

Demand-driven sourcing for Tungsten, Germanium, and Rare Earth Elements (REEs) essential for the energy transition and advanced electronics.

Why Elementa Global?

Traceability: End-to-end oversight from mine to port.

Dual Presence: Operations in ASEAN (Thailand) combined with a gateway to Europe (Turkey).

Compliance: Adherence to international trade standards and ethical sourcing protocols.

Connect with us to stabilize your raw material supply chain.

Afu-Mena International NV is a wholesaler of environmentally responsible gold sourced from local miners. We collaborate with NGOs established by these miners, purchasing their gold. To be a leader in sustainable and responsible mining, empowering tribal and indigenous communities, and making a positive environmental impact.

Name: Mineral Separation Technologies
Description:
In late 2014 one of our clients approached us looking for an alternative to the Shaking Tables they were using in their Gravity Gold projects. We quickly realized that the options available were limited to expensive chemical processes or cheap and nasty copies of the expensive, but good quality tables they were using.



We worked with them to design and manufacture the first MSP-ST120. This turned out to be a huge success and we went on to expand the ST Range to the four sizes we have available today, catering for the treatment of small laboratory samples right up to large scale gravity circuits.



In 2018 we decided that we needed to move all manufacturing in-house to be able to better control quality, lead times and price. To date we have supplied over 80 MSP-Shaking Tables to more than 12 countries around the world.


We are constantly working on new developments and enhancements to our Shaking Tables, always staying at the forefront of Mineral Separation.

We are proud recipients of a Ministry of Mines, Government of India grant, a national validation of our research-led innovation and commitment to sustainable impact.

But our journey is not just technical, it’s deeply human.

Our network of industry recognised partners, researchers, and engineers are the real power behind Jamp Industries. We’re not just building cleaner processes, we’re building long-term relationships.

Together, let’s create value that lasts and impact that matters.

With the recurrent debasement of world currencies by governments around the world through quantitative easing (i.e. money printing), owning precious metals in its physical form, especially silver, has become imperative for those wanting to preserve their wealth by protecting against inflation, unforeseen economic turmoil, and value fluctuations in other asset types. 

The silver price in 2004 was below $6.00 per ounce. In 2012, after a spike to almost $50.00 in 2011, the silver price has traded in the $32.00 range. This is an increase of over 500%. Can you afford to ignore this commodity? If your answer is 'no' and you would like to add physical silver to your portfolio, please take a minute to browse through our silver bullion products below. If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate for a minute to contact us.

Durbin Metal Industries exists for one simple reason: to help our customers succeed.

We deliver the right product, at the right time — on time, every time.

Built on a long-standing tradition of service, Durbin Metal Industries has earned a reputation as a trusted supplier of cut non-ferrous metals and plastics to customers across the UK. We combine the capability and stock depth of a large organisation with the friendly, flexible, customer-first approach of a family business, because great service should never feel corporate.

Family values sit at the heart of everything we do. They shape a culture where people take ownership, relationships matter, and customer needs always come first. Our customers trust us not just to supply material, but to support them with the right advice, the right service, and dependable delivery, even when deadlines are tight.

Since our establishment in 1982 by the Durbin family, we have grown from a local supplier into a nationwide operation, while staying true to the values that built the business: commitment, care, and consistency. That philosophy is backed by a comprehensive stock range and a team of people who genuinely care about getting it right.

Today, as part of the Amari family of companies, Durbin Metal Industries benefits from access to the UK’s largest stockholding of aluminium, stainless steel, copper, brass, bronze and plastics alongside the financial strength and purchasing power of one of Europe’s leading metals distributors. This investment enables fast, reliable UK-wide delivery, often within 24 hours.

We believe buying processed plate and bar should be straightforward. We aim to be the solution, not the problem and the loyalty of our customers tells us we’re delivering on that promise.

We are here to help. Always.

Description:

We are at the cutting-edge of next-generation recycling processes, as we take waste products -- which would normally end up in landfills -- and match the byproducts to companies that can use them. 
Our processes have economic benefits as well as environmental benefits, as we create new markets and help provide solutions for costly issues companies experience in the handling and disposing of unwanted byproducts from metal powder operations. Since 2005, Magnum Metals has provided these companies with recycling services and solutions tailored to their powder metal needs by making sure they have an environmentally-friendly place to safely recycle their waste.
We also sell new non-ferrous metal powders and material processing equipment. As of February 2018, Magnum Metals is the sole North American distributor for Unitfine Machinery Co., Ltd.'s complete line of material processing equipment. We are also the North American representative for Makin Metal Powders, Ltd., whose advanced and highly specialized powders provide the raw material for precision components with key applications for powder metallurgy, automotive, friction, carbon brush, filter, and other industries.

Some examples of the non-ferrous metals we buy, sell, and broker includes aluminum, zinc, copper, tin, lead, gold, silver, and magnesium. We manage these metals in a variety of forms, including powder, paste, sludge, and sheets.

Werken met ons betekent dat je je opdrachtgever een voorsprong geeft. Ons innovatieve karakter, ons streven naar ontzorging en de scherpe prijzen hebben een grote impact op mogelijkheden voor de bouwer. We zoeken namelijk altijd naar de meest optimale systeemoplossing voor elke afzonderlijke vraag – zo ontstaan op maat ontwikkelde innovaties.

We zijn ondernemend en proactief. We zien stilstand als achteruitgang en ook al zijn we partners, dan nog nemen we je zoveel mogelijk werk uit handen. Juist bij complexe opdrachten komt onze flexibiliteit in proces en logistiek goed tot uiting. Je kunt rekenen op onze oplossingsgericht- heid en probleemoplossend vermogen.

We zijn een familiebedrijf (sinds 1975) en dat betekent dat onze relaties en ons team centraal staan. Voor hen willen we waarde creëren. Daar hoort bij dat we slim ondernemen en kiezen voor hoogwaardige producten tegen scherpe prijzen. We zijn geen prijsvechter, maar je betaalt reële prijzen.

We kunnen nog veel meer vertellen, maar waarom je met ons zou moeten werken, ervaar je zelf het best. Dus maak kennis met ons. Heb je een project waar je onze expertise voor kunt gebruiken of wil je eerst kennismaken? Neem gerust contact met ons op. We spreken elkaar snel!

Name: Mineralmühle Leun, Rau GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
In the center of Europe, our company has developed into a leading supplier of special raw materials since it was founded in 1880. As a manufacturer and trader, we supply our customers all over the world with our products. In addition to natural minerals and synthetic fused and sintered products, our delivery program also includes chemical raw materials as well as metal and alloy powders.

Together with Mineralmühle Leun, the production company Kovohuty Dolny Kubin s.r.o (leading producer of FeSi 15, FeSi 45 and Potassium Titanate in Europe) belongs to our group of companies.

Our industrial customers are primarily from the following sectors: Welding, Refractory, Friction, Abrasives, Foundry, Construction and Ceramics. In addition to our delivery reliability with tailor-made products, they appreciate our range of services for the further processing of raw materials with which we can reliably and quickly meet individual customer requirements.

Name: SOFT Metais Ltda
Description:
Fundada em 1986, a Soft Metais fabrica, comercializa e distribui todos os tipos de ligas à base de estanho para as mais diversas utilizações, além de fluxos para soldagem e fios de zinco para utilização em revestimentos de superfícies através de pistolas de metalização em spray (a arco voltaico ou por chama).

Com sede em Bebedouro – SP, desde 1994, acreditamos que o potencial humano é nosso maior patrimônio e fonte de contínuo investimento. Atendemos cada cliente com total dedicação e afirmamos nosso compromisso com a sustentabilidade, tendo nossa qualidade certificada pelas normas da série ISO 9000 desde dezembro de 1997.

Contamos com laboratórios próprios que garantem o controle de tudo o que é adquirido, processado e de todos os produtos comercializados, sempre acompanhados do competente certificado de qualidade. Nossas matérias-primas provém de sólidas parcerias com grupos mineradores no Brasil e no exterior, garantindo os insumos que precisamos no ano todo. Este fato, aliado a uma grande capacidade de transformação, permite o rápido atendimento ao cliente em toda nossa extensa linha de produtos, com mais de 600 itens.

Temos parcerias para transferência de tecnologia com empresas globais que garantem a fabricação sob licença e distribuição dos produtos mais avançados para a indústria eletrônica, tais como solda em pasta e adesivos para SMD, fluxos especiais e outros produtos utilizados globalmente pelas montadoras de celulares, aparelhos de som e imagem, telecomunicações e outros.

Name: Seçkin Metal Nakliyat Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.Ş.
Description:
Şirketimiz Seçkin Nakliyat San Tic. AŞ adı altında 1993 yılında kurulmuştur.
 
Kurulduğu Denizli ili ve çevresinde sektöründe öncü firmalara (Er bakır-Dentaş vb.) nakliye hizmeti vermiştir.
 
2010 yılında faaliyet alanını değiştirerek demir çelik sektörüne girmiş,  ünvanı  Seçkin Metal Nak. San. Ve Tic. AŞ olarak değişmiştir.
 
Merkezi Denizli’de bulunan şirketimiz kurulduğu ilk yıllarda Gebze-Kocaeli’ndeki 1100m2 kapalı alan deposundan hizmet vermeye başlamış, 2013 yılında Dilovası – Kocaeli’nde alınan 2000m2 açık alan depo ile satış departmanı Dilovası’na taşınmıştır. 
 
2011 yılından itibaren başta İtalya olmak üzere Almanya, Rusya , Ukrayna, Romanya, G.Kore  ve Bulgaristan’dan 3.1 sertifikalı  6-300mm kalınlık aralığında levha sac ithalatına başlamıştır.
Tüccar olarak firmamız levha stoğunda Türkiye’nin en büyük firmalarından biridir. Her ay yeni gelen gemi ithalatlarıyla müşterilerimize sürdürülebilir ve süreklilik sağlayan stoklarımızla Dilovası ve Ereğli’den hizmet vermekteyiz.
 
Ürün gruplarımız=
1.	8-50mm arası gemi sacımız ( grade a/b/d/e/ah/eh/dh) eklenmiştir.
2.	6-300mm arası levha sacımız ST-37 – ST-52 – ( s235 jr / s235 jr0 / S355 / S355 JR / S355 J2+N / S355 MC / S700 MC ) 
3.	Özel Enler 2000 mm / 2500 mm / 3000 mm / 3650 mm 
4.	Ayrıca 1.5 – 25 mm arası Rulodan Açma ST-37 – ST-52 ‘de dönemsel olarak stoklarımıza girmektedir.
 
Hizmet kalitesi ve müşteri memnuniyeti ilkelerini benimseyen şirketimiz , müşterilerimizin beklentilerini karşılayacak proje saclar içinde (2500 / 3000 ) özel enlerde minumum tonaj miktarlarına görede hizmet vermektedir.
 
Referanslarımız : 
Firmamız Bir çok otomotiv, silo üretimi ,bağlantı elemanları, makine üreticileri, Trafo üreticileri, vinç raf donanım sistemleri ve sac tüccarlarının ana tedarikçisiyiz.
Misyonumuz
Müşterinin kalite talebine doğru yanıt vermek ve ürünü en hızlı şekilde tedarik etmek.
Vizyonumuz
İstikrarlı bir şekilde büyüyerek kendini gelişmek, uluslararası platformda kalitesiyle anılan saygın bir güç olmak.

Description:

PROFMETKOL to uznana firma działająca w branży metalowej, która dzięki ponad trzydziestoletniemu doświadczeniu, rozbudowanemu zapleczu magazynowemu i nowoczesnemu parkowi maszynowemu realizuje nawet najbardziej wymagające projekty. Specjalizujemy się w dystrybucji metali nieżelaznych (takich jak aluminium, miedź, mosiądz, cynk, ołów) oraz stali nierdzewnej – oferując je w formie blach, prętów, rur, profili i kształtowników.

Nasza przewaga to szybka realizacja zamówień, szeroki asortyment dostępny w magazynach o łącznej powierzchni ponad 22 500 m², i profesjonalna obsługa od projektu po dostawę. Dzięki nowoczesnym technologiom – lasery, WaterJet, prasy i piły – przeobrażamy wizje klientów w solidne produkty o wysokiej jakości.

Obsługujemy zarówno przedsiębiorstwa, jak i klientów indywidualnych, dbając o to, by każde zlecenie – niezależnie od wielkości – było realizowane z tym samym standardem. 

PROFMETKOL to partner, na którego możesz liczyć – jeśli chodzi o materiały, jeśli chodzi o wykonanie, jeśli chodzi o terminowość.

Name: EU Strategix Critical Metals
Description:
EuStrategix exists for one reason:
to keep critical supply chains moving — without compromising purity, compliance, or timing.

We specialize in EU-available, REACH-compliant high-purity critical metals and rare earths (4N–5N), delivered Just-In-Time (JIT) from bonded warehouses in Europe.

In a market dominated by bulk traders and long lead times, we operate differently.
EuStrategix is built for moments when supply risk becomes operational risk.

What we provide
• Guaranteed purity — 4N & 5N materials, independently certified
• Regulatory confidence — REACH, RoHS & OECD-aligned documentation
• Rapid response — bonded inventory in Madrid, ready to ship
• Full traceability — chain-of-custody and compliance on demand
• Focused scope — we don’t serve everyone; we serve critical needs

When a primary supplier slips, delays qualification, or fails compliance,
EuStrategix is already en route.

We are not a bulk trader.
We are not a generalist.
We supply small-lots through pilot lots. 
We are NOT a bulk supplier. 

We are a second line of supply — built for when failure isn’t an option.

Follow EUS for practical insights on EU-available, REACH-compliant critical-materials supply.

Name: Richfield Resources
Description:
Over time, the metal recycling industry has grown in leaps and bounds. 

At Richfield Resources, we believe that recycling scrap metal is a great way to contribute to the broad goal of sustainability by helping transform from linear models to circular economies.

We constantly strive to efficiently procure, export and import various grades of scrap metals, conforming to the ISRI specifications and committing ourselves to delivering the best quality and consistency every time. 

We have a vast network of credible and long-term partners, all the way from North America to Southeast Asia. Our business is more than capable of serving both commercial & domestic sectors, where every contract we take on is executed with utmost professionalism.

So no matter the size of your load, come aboard and we’ll be there!

Name: Multicom Resources
Description:
Multicom Resources Limited is a mining exploration company developing the Saint Elmo Project and the earlier stage multi-commodity Yappar Project.

Multicom Resources Pty Ltd is on a mission to bring high purity critical minerals to the world and become a reliable supplier for global technology manufacturers. 

Multicom is a Queensland based emerging multi-commodity exploration and processing company focused on the discovery, extraction and refining of world class critical mineral deposits. Multicom has several tenements including those that cover the Saint Elmo Project which will involve the construction of a mine and two refineries on site to produce the valuable critical minerals of Vanadium and High Purity Alumina. The Saint Elmo Project is integral to Australia’s battery revolution as Australia’s leading vanadium and high purity alumina proponent.  
 
Multicom has received the Government permitting and approvals including Mining Leases and Environmental Authority for the development of its Saint Elmo Project. The Saint Elmo Project is 100% owned by Multicom and is situated 25 km east of Julia Creek in Queensland’s North West Minerals Province.
 
Multicom has also identified potential in the emerging energy storage market. The company is working with New York-based StorEn Technologies to establish a vertically-integrated supply chain model for the manufacturing, sale and distribution of StorEn’s vanadium flow batteries.

Name: Field Industries LLC
Description:

Care - We are dedicated, persistent, and caring in all we do.  We take pride in our work, and our activities honor our commitments.  We are honest, loyal, respectful, and joyful in our interactions. 

Improve - We understand that the only constant is change, and we embrace this reality.  We take calculated risks to lead change and not follow it.  We aren’t complacent and we take actions to continuously improve.

Do - We are accountable, hardworking, and disciplined.  Our behaviors, processes, and controls enable us to do what we say.  We fight to reach our goals, and we don’t make excuses.  We don’t say “we can’t do this because” but instead “we could do this if.”

Serve - We have servant hearts.  We serve God, our families, our customers, our vendors, our industry, and our community.  These relationships are invaluable.  We appreciate the treasures of today and we seek to be good stewards of those treasures for a fruitful tomorrow.

Name: Astrup AS
Description:
ASTRUP AS er landets ledende leverandør innen metaller, spesialstål og plast halvfabrikata, og betjener byggebransjen og industri med alt innen aluminium, metaller, plast, rustfritt stål, syrefast stål, spesialstål og titan halvfabrikat. Vår produktkunnskap er på topp i bransjen og våre salgsfolk er regionalt til stede der kundene hører hjemme. Fra våre moderne lager i Oslo og Bergen forsyner vi norsk industri og byggebransje med presise leveranser.

I mer enn 165 år har Astrup betjent det norske markedet med produkter og tjenester. Vi skal kjennetegnes ved kvalitet i våre produkter, og i det arbeidet vi utfører. Vi skal tilby et stort mangfold av produkter og tjenester, og være en industripartner for våre kunder, leverandører og øvrige samarbeidspartnere.

Kvalitet
Astrup Kvalitetssystem er utviklet i henhold til kravene i NS-EN ISO 9001, og gir en beskrivelse av organisasjonens viktigste prosesser og rutiner.

Tradisjon
Astrup AS ble etablert som manefakturhandel i 1857. I 1865 startet vi engrosvirksomheten for skipsbyggere, håndverkere og den norske industrien som begynte å vokse frem. Sortimentet omfattet nærmest alt i stål og metaller, plater, stenger, bolt, rør og fittings, kjetting, ankere, wirer og forhudningsmetall, men også andre produkter som seilduk, kompass, fendere, redningsbøyer og maskinremmer. Etter hvert ble mer moderne materialer som aluminium, plast og høylegerte stålmaterialer en naturlig del av sortimentet. 

Innovasjon
Basert på mange års erfaring og høy kompetanse innen ulike materialer, samt et solid nettverk av kvalitetsprodusenter, ser vi etter nye muligheter for innovative løsninger basert på de materialer vi leverer. Vi kan vise til mange gode eksempler der vi har utviklet vellykkede kundeløsninger som har gitt kunden god effektiviseringsgevinst.

Name: Countrywide Metals Ltd
Description:
We’re a trusted scrap metal recycling partner for businesses across Birmingham, Solihull, the West Midlands and nationwide.

We work with engineering firms, manufacturers, demolition contractors, automotive workshops, commercial facilities and door-trade customers - helping both organisations and tradesmen turn metal waste into profitable, compliant recycling streams.

With over 20 years of industry experience, our team delivers a service built on speed, transparency and reliability. We offer competitive prices, fast collections, and supply metal bins for ongoing recycling needs - helping your business stay organised, efficient and fully compliant.

Our core recycling capabilities include:
• Ferrous & non-ferrous metal recycling
• Cable, copper, aluminium & stainless steel recycling
• Factory & site clearances
• Regular scheduled collections for commercial clients
• Duty-of-care documentation and full compliance support

As an accredited member of the BMRA (British Metals Recycling Association), ALFED (Aluminium Federation) and BIR (Bureau of International Recycling), we operate to the highest industry standards. These memberships reflect our commitment to professional practice, responsible recycling and delivering a trusted service to businesses and trade customers across the UK.

We’re here to help your organisation or trade business maximise the value of its scrap metal, reduce waste and maintain high levels of compliance - with a reliable partner you can depend on.

Coolmet painted PVDF jacketing reflecting external heat away from metal surfaces offering improved corrosion resistance on stainless steel, all secured with our market leading Bandfix range of banding, seals,  and accessory's. 

We have successfully worked on many of the large LNG projects worldwide, our new innovations offer improved metal solutions for acoustics, abrasion resistance, heat reflectivity and emissivity, fire resistance and low temp (Arctic) insulation. E have developed these systems working with Sheffield Hallam University and their Materials Engineering Research Institute (MERI) and a team of engineers. Our solutions have been used and approved by engineers worldwide.

All our manufacturing and distribution is centralised around our head office in Preston, Lancashire. From their we can retain strict quality controls before supplying to a mixture of direct end users or local distributors in Australia, USA, Canada, Saudi Arabia, Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Kazakhstan and many more countries.

We have in-house processing facilities for cut to length metals, re-coiling, sliting, wire winding, edge dressing, blanking, lamination including stainless steel, aluminium and Aluzinc. Our coatings include Polythene and Surlyn used as a moisture barrier (Drymet), PVDF paint coating (Coolmet), Mass loaded Vinyl (Soundmet) or Tedlar / PVF (Tedmet)

We are the UK's largest independent distributor of Stainless Steel wire, we can offer a full range of stainless steel grades and types including tying or lacing wire, cold heading wire and spring wire.

Name: ASG Aluminium GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ein mittelständisches Unternehmen mit Hauptsitz in Mönchengladbach. Im Jahr 2001 gegründet, ist ASG heute Ihr erfahrener und kompetenter Partner rund um individuelle Profillösungen aus Aluminium. Als Produktions- und Dienstleistungsunternehmen bieten wir seit fast 20 Jahren die Konzeption und Entwicklung sowie die Herstellung und den Vertrieb von stranggepressten Aluminiumprofilen an. Unsere Maxime ist seit Gründung: eine gleichbleibend hohe Qualität zur Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden zu liefern. 

Dabei unterstützen und beraten wir Kunden angefangen bei der Konzeption von Aluminiumprofilen, über die Verarbeitung und Veredelung, bis hin zur Lagerung und just-in-time-Lieferung.

Von der Idee zum Profil
Am Anfang steht die Konzeption. Gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden entwickeln wir individuelle Profile. Dabei werden unter anderem Fragen zur optimalen Presstechnik berücksichtigt. Im Anschluss daran beauftragen wir einen unserer langjährigen und versierten Partner mit der Fertigung Ihrer Profile. Kunden der ASG profitieren so von einem „Rundum-Service“: fertige Profile lagern wir an unserem Sitz in Giesenkirchen. So können Sie Ressourcen sparen und auch kleinere Mengen jederzeit sukzessive abrufen. 

Spezialisten für besondere Anforderungen
Bei Bedarf übernehmen wir auch die mechanische Bearbeitung von Profilen. Neben Sägen, Stanzen, Bohren und Fräsen umfasst unser Leistungsspektrum dabei auch das Entgraten, Gewindeschneiden und Biegen sowie die CNC-Bearbeitung. Im Hinblick auf die Veredelung von Oberflächen können wir zudem ein großes Spektrum an Eloxal- und RAL-Farbtönen anbieten.

Sie sind auf der Suche nach individuellen Profillösungen? Dann nehmen Sie jetzt Kontakt mit uns auf.

Name: Berlin Metals
Description:
Berlin Metals opened in 1932 as Hokin Steel & Tinplate and was purchased by the Berlin family in 1967. In 2018, Berlin Metals joined the Olympic Steel family of businesses, delivering on a strategy of continued safe, sustainable and profitable growth. With minimal customer overlap, the acquisition was a perfect complement to Olympic Steel’s existing operations.

Operating today with four coil slitters in Hammond, IN (25 minutes south of downtown Chicago), Berlin Metals is one of the largest service center distributors focused on light gauge prime tin mill coiled products (tin plate, black plate, TFS) and stainless-steel strip globally. Other metals include mill finished aluminum, prefinished and galvanized steel. Berlin also provides tolling services for a variety of light gauge metals. 

Customers of Berlin Metals are leaders in the manufacturing of automotive, chimney liners and transportation components, residential windows, telecommunications cables, computer and electronic parts, hardware and other stampings. Berlin Metals is an Olympic Steel company.

Maxworth International specializes in the sourcing, processing and value addition of industrial minerals such as Garnet, IImenite, Sillimanite, PS Ball and the sourcing, and processing of ferrous and non-ferrous metals. The company has its own processing and shipping facilities located in Malaysia and in Southern India.

Maxworth is committed to sourcing minerals and metals that are consistent in quality and grade and are delivered on-time - every time. Since 2011, we have built up a strong unified supply network and distribution chain.

The recently opened warehouse and storage facility within the Visakhapatnam Special Economic Zone in Southern India has allowed Maxworth to further reduce delivery times. The facility also allows for the reprocessing of garnet and mineral products to meet the specific requirements of customers.

Company Overview

The company is committed to helping contractors maximize returns on surplus formwork and providing reliable, graded materials for new projects through a transparent, value-driven approach.

Vision and Mission
Skywin’s vision is to become India’s most trusted marketplace for used aluminum formwork, setting new benchmarks for transparency, reliability, and value creation. The mission prioritizes honest, weight-based valuations, clear grading, and seamless logistics, ensuring fairness and trust in every transaction.

Core Strengths and Unique Selling Points
Backed by Winntus Group’s legacy and network

Transparent, no-hidden-cost pricing with certified weighing and clear grading

Pan-India insured logistics and digital workflow for efficiency

Rigorous quality assurance with ABC grading and photographic documentation

Fast processing—same-day estimates, swift inspections, and immediate payment

Por isso, oferecemos, sem custo, projetos padronizados de construções em Light Steel Frame, além de fabricarmos estruturas sob medida, com perfis cortados e embalados para facilitar a montagem no canteiro. Para máxima eficiência, oferecemos também a opção de entrega dos painéis já montados, reduzindo o tempo e o desperdício da sua construção.

Qualidade é o nosso pilar. Contamos com uma equipe de engenheiros e arquitetos que garantem a responsabilidade técnica de nossos produtos, todos em conformidade com as normas ABNT. Oferecemos garantia vitalícia contra defeitos de fabricação, um reflexo da nossa confiança na durabilidade e performance do nosso aço.

Name: JDC Lava - Substrate
Description:
De Belgische markt van de substraten is de laatste jaren enorm gegroeid. Er bestaan ondertussen al heel wat verschillende soorten substraten met elk hun specifieke mix.

Met JDC Lava-substrates zijn we sinds 2016 op zoek naar de beste mineralen die gemixt worden tot een hoogstaand kwalitatief lavasubstraat. Door de jaren heen hebben wij de organische stof in ons substraat geëlimineerd en op vandaag werken wij dus alleen nog maar met mineralen. Deze bewuste keuze is gemaakt in functie van de beplanting op de daken. Ons grover mineraal substraat zorgt voor meer zuurstof ten opzicht van een gecomposteerd organisch substraat met gevolg dat de plant zich op eigen tempo kan wortelen met sterke, mooie planten als gevolg.

Dit is een lange termijn visie die volledig in ons duurzaamheidsverhaal past. We merken dat bij organische substraten de beplanting een boost krijgt bij aanplanting maar nadien heel wat extra bemesting nodig is. Wij streven naar een daktuin die zo zelfstandig mogelijk kan leven. Het is onze bedoeling om het dak niet als eerste groen te krijgen, maar als langste groen te houden op een zo natuurlijk mogelijke manier.

De zoektocht naar een ideale mix is een proces die nooit eindigt. Zo blijven we vandaag sleutelen aan de mix en blijven we op zoek gaan naar nieuwe natuurlijke producten die zorgen voor een optimale biologie in de substraten.

Mais c’est en 2008 que l’entreprise prend son envol lorsqu’elle devient distributeur autorisé de la compagnie Robit qui est basée en Finlande. Attakroc connaît alors une croissance majeure entre 2008 et 2013 en doublant son chiffre d’affaires pratiquement à chaque année.

Tout récemment, pendant la saison estivale de 2021, Attakroc Inc. a été acquise par la compagnie Mincon dans un plan stratégique d'expansion visant à étendre sa présence mondiale sur des marchés clés, garantissant ainsi aux clients l'accès à la gamme complète des solutions de forage qu'elle propose.

Histórico
A BN iniciou sua operação em 1972, no município de Atibaia, na grande São Paulo, conquistando espaço no cenário de bucha para fixação de rolamentos dirigidos a bens de capital como equipamentos agrícolas e máquinas têxteis.

Em 1984 com a intenção de fortalecer-se e estruturar-se, começou sua atuação na área de caixas de medição, sendo rapidamente aceita nos canais de distribuição.
Após isso se dedicou exclusivamente ao mercado de quadros de comando. 

Qualidade
A BN tem como principal objetivo a constante busca pela qualidade e o padrão de qualidade BN é reconhecido por seus clientes. Busca também a liderança de mercado, melhoria contínua de seus processos e produtos.

We deal with a variety of products, including Bentonite, Cat Litter, Laterite, Bleaching Earth, Silica Sand & Attapulgite. Our production facility under the name of "Ashirwad Minechem" was established in 2006 in Mandvi of Kutch district of Gujarat, very close to bentonite mines and the port of Mundra. With the goal of achieving rapid supply in the global market, we have established our corporate office in Gandhidham, close to Kandla, one of India's major ports. 

Our 38 service-minded professionals with adequate industry knowledge are all time ready to serve quality products to our partners. Iris Impulse India Pvt Ltd owned by leaders in the industry with 8.50 million tons of estimated reserves and a 203 acres of total mining area. Our bentonite reserves capacity will increase to 10.50 million tons in the near future as we will acquire new mining areas of 50 acres with estimated reserves of an additional 2 million tons. Our mining sites have an annual bentonite lumps activation capacity of 1,00,000 MTS. Regarding our laterite reserves Our 34 acres of mining space contains an estimated 3 million tons of laterite. To ensure the best product for our partners, we manage quality control at each stage of the process at our laboratory facility equipped with latest equipment’s.
