Name: RAW MATTERS podcast
Description:
Welcome to RAW MATTERS, your v/podcast about the critical metals and minerals that determine our common future, hosted by Peter Tom Jones (SIM² KU Leuven) and Julia Poliscanova (Transport & Environment).

Clean energy, electric mobility, digital/AI technologies, and modern defense capabilities all rely on one foundation: critical raw materials. Yet with rising geopolitical tensions, concentrated supply chains, and growing reliance on a small number of producing countries, the world faces a profound challenge: how to build resilient, responsible, and diversified raw materials systems that support our green and digital transitions? 

Hosted by Peter Tom Jones (Director, KU Leuven Institute for Sustainable Metals and Minerals) and Julia Poliscanova (Senior Director for Electric Vehicles & Batteries at Transport & Environment), the vodcast brings together leading voices from around the world — across civil society, academia, industry, and policymaking. Episodes will unpack key topics such as the increasing weaponisation of critical minerals; the future of green steelmaking; the complex supply chains for rare earths, lithium and other critical minerals; the production and recycling of batteries, magnets and EVs; and the search for benefit-sharing responsible mining models. 

Follow this page to stay ahead in the global critical minerals debate.

Whether you're a policymaker, researcher, investor, or simply curious, RAW MATTERS is your gateway to the debates shaping our common future.

Name: Anita Steel & Metals
Description:
Welcome to Anita Steel and Metals! We are a premier manufacturer, exporter, importer, and stockist of various metal products. With a strong focus on delivering prime quality materials, we have built a reputation for excellence in supplying to large sector industries, government departments, and reputed concerns both in India and abroad.

Our commitment to prime quality is not a matter of chance; it is a conscious effort that drives us to work efficiently and deliver materials that fully satisfy our clients' needs. We adhere to the highest standards of metal quality, ensuring complete conformation to industry benchmarks. Our extensive range of products includes Stainless Steel, Carbon Steel, Mild Steel, Alloy Steel, Copper, Brass, Nickel, Cupronickel, Monel, Inconel, available in various forms such as sheets, plates, pipes, rods, strips, circles, channels, angles, pipe fittings, and instrumentation fittings.

Having gained substantial experience in the field, we have successfully served reputed concerns and government sectors, earning their repeat business. We now seek to establish a fruitful association with your firm, where we will go the extra mile to offer you high-quality materials on the most convenient terms and conditions.

At Anita Steel and Metals, we prioritize financial stability and possess a well-equipped team of qualified and efficient personnel for inspection purposes. We are associated with a government-approved laboratory, ensuring that all materials supplied by us conform to the required specifications. Whether it's chemical composition, tensile strength, hardness, ISC bending, flattening, flaring, corrosion resistance, high-temperature characteristics, weldability, or machinability, we can meet any specification for any application across various engineering and other industries.

Anita Steel and Metals – Your trusted partner for top-quality metal supplies. Let us exceed your expectations with our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction

As the last 30 years have taught us, it's important to plan for the unexpected. Therefore, it is necessary to have some form of business continuity plan. The best way to ensure your company's survival in an emergency is to have a solid disaster recovery plan in place. This plan must be developed before any major disasters occur. It should include all the steps to take if something goes wrong.

BUY PIPE provides an excellent opportunity to create such a plan. This is because our experts have experience in similar situations, which allows companies to focus on what they do best.

The question is to find a reputable partner who understands the importance of planning ahead. They must offer a full range of services, including the ability to regularly test their plans.

If you want to take full advantage of the market, contact BUY PIPE experts to help you create and implement a sustainable development model for your business.

Name: Önerler Steel and Heat Treatment
Description: Önerler Makine Çelik Isıl İşlem Ltd.Şti. first started heat treatment activities with a small electric furnace built by its founder Master Technical Teacher Adem ÖNER in 1967, started to import tool steel in 1974 and it continued its activities by adding a salt bath. With the opening of the organized industrial zone in 1971 and the activation of automobile factories such as Tofaş-Fiat and Renault, a rapid development took place in the industry. This development has increased the importance of heat treatment and steel. Since this date, Önerler has started its growth process to adapt to developing technology. Until the establishment of the heat treatment workshop of Tofaş-Fiat company in 1986, the heat treatment of many automobile and mold apparatus parts of this company was performed by Önerler Ltd. Şti and the supply of steels such as tool steel, alloyed carbon steels, case-hardening steels has been provided. This relationship still continues through sub-industries.

Name: DAIKO
Description:
For over 40 years, DAIKO SRL has been a global leader in welding consumables, offering innovative solutions that meet the most demanding technical and quality standards across key industrial sectors.
Founded with a specialized focus on corrosion-resistant alloys, DAIKO has grown to provide a comprehensive catalog covering all major welding processes, including SMAW, GTAW, GMAW, FCAW, SAW, and ESW. This extensive range is the result of meticulous raw material selection and long-standing collaborations with leading international producers.
What Sets Us Apart
•	Extensive Inventory: A large stock ensures fast deliveries and precise supplies, meeting the needs of customers worldwide.
•	Trusted Expertise: Qualified by prestigious global clients in the oil & gas, chemical, and petrochemical industries, as well as pressure vessel and valve manufacturing sectors.
•	High-Performance Products: Our welding consumables are engineered for reliable, high-quality results, including specialized solutions for nickel alloys and corrosion-resistant applications. Our DAIKOW 625 wire has redefined industry standards through decades of design expertise and rigorous testing.
Tailored Solutions for Maintenance & Repairs
DAIKO also excels in providing welding consumables designed for the industrial maintenance sector, offering solutions for repairing manganese steels, high-carbon steels, and cast iron. Our consumables are optimized for anti-wear surfacing, heat-resistant coatings, and hard coatings, addressing a wide range of industrial needs.
Innovation in Wear-Resistant Components
Leveraging decades of expertise, we manufacture custom wear-resistant plates and components such as pipes, curves, cyclones, and fans. We also offer comprehensive maintenance and construction services for mechanical parts subject to extreme wear, including shredders, crushing mills, impellers, and stellite knives.
DAIKO SRL is your trusted partner for welding consumables and industrial maintenance solutions.

Name: Critical Minerals Association (India)
Description:
The Critical Minerals Association (India) is a dedicated organization fostering India’s self-reliance and leadership in the global critical minerals industry. We represent a robust alliance of industry leaders, government bodies, and academic partners, all working together to secure India’s critical mineral resources. In a world increasingly driven by sustainable technology and high-tech innovation, our mission is to ensure that India has the strategic resources to fuel growth, stability, and technological leadership across sectors like EVs, aerospace, defense, renewable energy, and more.

The CMA envisions a future where India mines, processes, and manufactures its critical minerals domestically, reducing dependency and fueling local industry. Through strategic alliances, international partnerships, and innovative research, we strive to position India as a global leader in the critical minerals supply chain, meeting the demands of high-tech industries and supporting the nation’s green energy transition.

Name: Renewable Metals
Description:
Lithium batteries play a vital role in the transition from fossil fuels to a clean energy future – but what happens when they reach the end of their life?
Renewable Metals’ unique alkali recycling process recovers critical minerals from old batteries so they can be used again and again. 
Our process recovers almost all the lithium, nickel, cobalt, copper and manganese in batteries, with fewer steps and lower costs, without creating another waste problem (like disposing of sodium sulfate).
Big picture? It’s about finding practical, impactful, sustainable ways to accelerate decarbonisation and protect our planet. Recycling is the lowest-carbon source of critical minerals.
A new perspective on a worldwide problem 
Renewable Metals was founded by a team of expert West Australian metallurgists who’ve spent decades extracting battery metals from mining ore bodies and concentrates around the world.
As a major producer of lithium, nickel and other metals, Australia boasts some world-leading metal extraction experts. Unlike the rest of the world, the country has a long history of alkali-based metallurgy for refining nickel and cobalt.  
That collective knowledge put us in a unique position to invent a world-first, alkali-based recycling process. 
As our concept comes to life, we’re working with businesses throughout the global lithium battery supply chain. 
Want to get involved? Get in touch.

Name: Geo40 Limited
Description:
Geo40 is an innovative technology development and operating company based in New Zealand. We target sustainable, low-carbon recovery of valuable minerals from subterranean fluids.

We're a team of diverse experts committed to solving global sustainability challenges within strong environmental, social and governance principles.

We believe that the imperative for decarbonisation is acute. We know we can leverage our technology to play a meaningful role here.

Our focus to date has been on recovering silica, commonly the most abundant and problematic element for geothermal plant operators. Removing the silica first can open the gateway to recovering the other valuable elements (including Critical Minerals), which are generally present in lower concentrations.

With the commercialisation of Geo40’s silica-recovery technology (Ohaaki Northern Plant), the company’s technology-development focus has been increasing directed onto lithium, with some early stage work on other valuable elements.

Follow us to learn about sustainable mineral recovery - how we do it, how we can contribute to decarbonisation, and the benefits of working with us.

Name: Battery Minerals
Description:
A subsidiary of Gelion plc, Battery Minerals' goal is to develop a more efficient battery recycling process to enable a circular economy for battery production.

Incorporated in September 2024, Battery Minerals' aim is to develop and then commercialise the Lithium-Ion ("Li-Ion") recycling technology acquired by Gelion from Johnson Matthey in 2023. 

Part of the Technology Developer Accelerator Programme (TDAP), the objective of Battery Minerals is to develop a novel recycling process designed to provide lower cost, lower waste, lower eCO2 and provide the ability to efficiently extract lithium from more battery scrap sources. The growing volume of battery waste presents an environmental challenge, an economic opportunity, and a strategic opportunity.

Exportaciones: Las exportaciones en este subsector minero crecieron más de 250% entre 2008 y 20181.
Variedad: Perú produce más de 30 tipos de minerales no metálicos, incluyendo caliza, fosfato, travertino, hormigón, arena, calcita, sal, arcilla, yeso, cuarzo, mármol, talco, entre otros.
Aplicaciones: Estos minerales tienen aplicaciones importantes en sectores como infraestructura, agricultura e industria.
Empresas como SICSA son ejemplos de entidades en este mercado, con más de 60 años de experiencia, especializándose en la explotación, procesamiento y comercialización de minerales como la arena sílice.

Este sector es vital para la economía nacional, abasteciendo materias primas a mercados principalmente vinculados a la construcción y la elaboración de cemento, así como a actividades productivas industriales.

Name: Interbaro Recycling B.V.
Description:
Interbaro is al vanaf 1970 actief in de wereld van metalen. Begonnen als metaalbewerker en met zijn tijd mee doorontwikkeld tot metaalverwerker. Door de kennis en ervaring die er is opgedaan in productietechnieken en productieprocessen, is het Interbaro van nu een bedrijf dat verwerking totaal in eigen beheer kan uitvoeren.

Recycling is onderdeel van een circulaire economie, waarbij het draait om het product of materiaal aan het einde van de pijplijn. Kan het product hergebruikt worden of wordt het product gerecycled. 
Circulair denken en doen gaat nog een stap verder. In de circulaire economie kijk je naar de hele levensduur van een product. Niet alleen: wat doe je als het product afgeschreven is, maar ook: hoe kun je iets op zo’n manier ontwerpen dat de grondstoffen steeds opnieuw, zonder verlies van kwaliteit, ingezet kunnen worden. 
Interbaro is als dienstverlener dé verbinder tussen de eindgebruiker/ontdoener van het afgeschreven materiaal en de volgende stappen in de kringloop. Naast materiaalstromen ontstaan er gedurende het verwerkingsproces ook zeer waardevolle informatiestromen over het vrijgekomen materiaal.

Bij Interbaro staat er altijd een flexibel team van gemotiveerde medewerkers klaar om u te ontzorgen.  Dit gebeurt milieubewust en volgens Europese wet- en regelgeving. Zo verlaten vele materialen die bij ons bedrijf binnen komen het terrein weer als direct in te zetten grondstoffen.

Ons bedrijf heeft o.a. de volgende certificeringen:
- ISO 9001
- ISO 14001
- VCA**
- Safety Culture Ladder Trede 3
- NIWO

Name: SPS Companies, Inc
Description:
The roots of the SPS Companies go back to 1933 when our founder, Sam Goldstein, set out from Nebraska to try to find a way to support his family.  After his car broke down outside of Manhattan, KS he decided to set up shop and Kansas Hide and Wool was formed. From there Sam and his son Jack, always looking for ways to expand started bringing steel back on their empty trucks and selling it to the farmers they were buying the hides and wools from.  Within 20 years steel was the primary business and by 1959 it was the only business. 

Today's SPS Companies is a diverse family employing more than 500 people throughout the Midwest and Northern Mexico offering a wide range of services that include:

    -Logistics and Distribution of carbon steel products
    -Coil Processing including cut-to-length, temper, tension-level, break-for-weight, and slitting
    -Fabrication featuring the nations largest shape laser
     -Structural and mechanical tubing, coated pipe, and specialty pipe mill
     -Distribution and fabrication of round, square, rectangle and oval galvanized tubing
     -Storage
     -Metallurgical testing in A2LA Certified labs

Since the beginning, we have had an enduring commitment to our communities and employees and those commitments remain strong today.  Private scholarships, our healthy lifestyle initiative Thrive, support for community volunteerism, and support of important community initiatives are just a few of the things that make working at one of the SPS Companies family rewarding.

Name: Tara Coins
Description:
Tara Coins is a new designer and wholesaler from Ireland of beautiful, collectible, store of value 99.99% pure Irish silver and gold coins.

Tara Coins is inspired by the beautiful ‘Hill of Tara’ - the ancient and sacred seat of Irish High Kings in Ireland for over 5,000 years. Tara Coins evokes this deep and rich mythological, historical, cultural and spiritual tradition and the brand signifies freedom, beauty and abundance.

Tara Coins Logo
Irish and Celtic gold and silver bullion coins and rounds have never been done in a truly professional manner and in large volumes.

Thus, there is a key niche in the Irish and the global bullion and numismatic coin market that is not being catered to. 

Tara Coins are anticipated to be highly valued and cherished as they will be beautiful Irish coins which resonate with people in Ireland, the Irish diaspora globally and people around the world who are interested in Irish and Celtic history and peoples.

Tara Coins channel our ancestral past, our culture and the spirit of the Celts and the Irish people globally.

The coins are being designed in Ireland in collaboration with artists who specialise in designing coins. The bullion & collector coins will be truly beautiful and will be limited in mintage and supply making them highly sought after as collectible coins and as stores of value.

Our vision is to see Tara Coins become an ethical, trusted global brand celebrated for the designing, minting and wholesaling of gold and silver coins for nations and peoples throughout our beautiful planet.

Name: Mine to Market
Description:
Mine-to-Market is a digitally integrated global marketplace that streamlines the sourcing, validation, and movement of critical minerals essential to the world’s energy-transition agenda. By unifying miners, processors, OEMs, traders, and financiers on a single platform, it brings transparency, traceability, and efficiency to a traditionally fragmented sector.

Through aggregated demand, standardized contracting, blockchain-enabled provenance, and real-time supply intelligence, the platform drives lower costs, stronger compliance, and faster deal execution. It also uplifts artisanal and small-scale miners by formalizing operations and unlocking premium market access.

Ultimately, Mine-to-Market functions as a global operating system for reliable, affordable, and sustainable critical-mineral supply—powering the world’s shift toward clean energy and net-zero futures.

Name: SIGMA STEEL DOO
Description:
SIGMA STEEL DOO Smederevska Palanka je privatno preduzeće osnovano decembra 2022.godine koje posluje kao društvo sa ograničenom odgovornošću u oblasti trgovine na veliko metalnom robom, instalacionim materijalima, opremom i priborom za grejanje sa sedištem u Smederevskoj Palanci. Kompanija je kako internacionalno, tako i ka domaćem tržištu orijentisana u domenima trgovine na veliko i malo.

Tim koji čini naš kolektiv ima preko 30 godina iskustva iz oblasti zavarivanja, osvrćući se na potrebe klijenata i praćenju procesa zavarivanja je u mogućnosti da odgovori na sve zahteve naših saradnika iz oblasti zavarivnaja. Imajući u vidu dugogodišnje iskustvo iz oblasti zavarivanja, uvažavanje i ispunjenje potreba naših saradnika, nastao je i slogan kompanije “Welding Experience In Box ”. Pored trgovine najkvalitetnijim proizvodima, za koje se staramo i da budu pristupačni našim klijentima, upustili smo se i u proizvodnju dodatnih materijala za zavarivanje kako bi najkvalitetnije proizvode ponudili našim partnerima po pristupačnim cenama.

SIGMA STEEL je prvi sertifikovani proizvođač dodatnih materijala za zavarivanje na teritoriji Srbije u skladu sa standardom EN 13479. Kao takav, brendirali smo i naš prvi dodatni materijal za zavarivanje – žica za zavarivanje MAG postupkom pod nazivom “WELCON MAG”. Description:

Recycling is one of the most important building blocks of a circular economy. Every year about 2.3 million tonnes of metal are recycled in Sweden. Most metals can be melted down and used again without noticeable quality losses. At recycling, up to 95% of the energy needed to break ore and make new metal is saved.

SkrotSmart receives iron and metal scrap from companies and private individuals.

Name: EIT REE-FLEX
Description:
REE-FLEX stands for “Skid REE SX pilot unit in nitrate route designed for flexible input streams.” This high-TRL EIT RawMaterials Upscaling project (KAVA 13 call) focuses on the separation of rare earths (REs), including both light and heavy REs, using next-generation solvent extraction technology. The project consortium includes Carester (the French company that is building the largest heavy RE separation facility in the Western world, meeting the most stringent environmental standards) and KU Leuven, which participates through its KU Leuven Institute for Sustainable Metals and Minerals (SIM² KU Leuven) & the SOLVOMET Group (Koen Binnemans). SOLVOMET is renowned for its expertise in RE solvent extraction and serves as the REE-FLEX coordinator (Peter Tom Jones). 

REE-FLEX is a 3-year project with a total budget of €4.7 million (EIT RawMaterials funding + co-funding from Carester & KU Leuven). The project officially kicked off on 1 September 2025. 

In REE-FLEX, Carester and KU Leuven (KUL) are developing next generation SX technology for L/HRE separation via the nitrate route, integrating artificial intelligence (AI) and real-time analysis. This innovation significantly reduces SX’s OPEX/CAPEX and ecological footprint while enhancing feed flexibility.
Carester will deploy the REE-FLEX skid SX pilot unit to support EU & non-EU customers in designing future RE separation plants.

Name: Critical Minerals Refining, Inc.
Description:
Critical Minerals Refining Inc. (CMR) has developed cutting-edge technologies combining fingerprint DNA tracing and artificial intelligence to identify, track, and refine critical minerals precisely. This advanced approach offers several advantages, including enhanced transparency and accountability through precise identification and tracking of mineral samples. The integration of artificial intelligence enables efficient data analysis and decision-making, leading to
improved refining efficiency and quality control. Additionally, this technology allows for extracting valuable elements from complex mineral compositions, maximizing resource utilization.

With decades of experience refining metals, Critical Minerals Refining Inc. scientists and engineers are known to the U.S. Departments of Energy and Defense and several national laboratories engaged in scientific and defense-related research. CMR plans to establish an integrated global supply chain for strategic minerals and rare earth elements (REEs), from mining to concentrating, recycling, and refining. Within the next few years, CMR aims to have four locations in operation, spanning from the United States to Africa.

Critical Minerals Refining, Inc.’s proprietary, environmentally neutral refining
technologies can refine every mineral, including lithium, cobalt, REEs, graphite,
tungsten, platinum group metals (PGMs), indium, gallium, antimony, and
titanium. These minerals find applications in every industry, including energy
storage, electronics, automotive, aerospace, defense, pharmaceuticals, and
medical industries.

Critical Minerals Refining, Inc. only sources from non-conflict nations with
proven and verified non-force labor.

Nous nous efforçons à être toujours le plus réactif possible, et apportons un point d'honneur à vous apporter tous les conseils nécessaire afin de répondre à vos problématiques et à vos besoins, le tout dans une volonté de vous satisfaire au quotidien.

Name: Fênix Metais
Description:
Somos uma distribuidora especializada em metais não ferrosos, oferecendo materiais de alta qualidade como cobre, latão, alumínio, bronze e aço inoxidável. Nossa linha inclui chapas, barras retangulares, redondas, quadradas e sextavadas, tarugos e buchas, todos projetados para atender às necessidades específicas de diversos setores industriais. Além disso, prestamos serviços de corte personalizados, garantindo precisão e eficiência nas soluções sob medida para nossos clientes.

Atendemos a indústrias de diferentes segmentos, como a automotiva, que utiliza nossos metais em componentes de motores, sistemas de transmissão e carrocerias, além do setor de eletroeletrônicos, onde nossos materiais são usados em circuitos e conectores. O setor de telecomunicações também se beneficia de nossa gama de produtos para a fabricação de antenas, cabos e outros equipamentos de transmissão.

Somos particularmente fortes no setor de geração, distribuição e transmissão de energia, que é um dos maiores consumidores de barramentos de cobre. O cobre, devido à sua alta condutividade elétrica e resistência à corrosão, é essencial em subestações, painéis elétricos e outros sistemas que exigem a condução eficiente de grandes correntes elétricas.

Além disso, nossos materiais são amplamente utilizados na indústria naval e aeroespacial, assim como em máquinas e equipamentos industriais, onde o bronze e o latão são apreciados por sua durabilidade e resistência ao desgaste. Esses metais são fundamentais para peças de alta precisão, como engrenagens e buchas, garantindo eficiência em aplicações industriais críticas.

Nosso compromisso é fornecer produtos de excelência e soluções práticas, sempre com foco na qualidade, precisão e atendimento ágil. Independentemente do setor, nossa equipe está pronta para oferecer suporte técnico especializado e garantir que você tenha os melhores metais não ferrosos para seus projetos.

Name: Hertsch AG
Description:
1895 Am 1. April 1895 gründet Dr. Albert Blum die Firma Kaller Böhler-Stahl in Stuttgart (Deutschland).
1918 Übernahme der Stahlhandelsfirma Wilhelm Hertsch und Namensänderung in Wilhelm Hertsch & Co. GmbH.
1920 Der Firmensitz wird in die Schweiz nach Zürich verlegt. Vom neuen Lagerbetrieb in Islikon/TG aus, wird der Handel mit allen Edelstahlgüten in der Schweiz aufgenommen.
1953 Die Firma wird auf den Namen «Hertsch & Cie, Nachfolger Max Markwalder» umfirmiert.
1970 Die Firma wird in die Aktiengesellschaft «Hertsch & Cie AG» umgewandelt.
1995 100-jähriges Firmenjubiläum. Zertifizierung nach ISO 9001 durch die akkreditierte SQS.
2002 - 2009 Einrichtung und Inbetriebnahme von zwei vollautomatischen KASTO Hochregallagern mit beigestellten Sägecentern
2014 Firmenaufspaltung der Hertsch & Cie AG in die Firmen Lanthan & Hertsch AG und Hertsch AG.
Die Firma Hertsch AG führt die operative Geschäftstätigkeit mit den neuen Besitzern weiter.
2020 125-jähriges Firmenjubiläum


Die Schweizer Edelstahlprofis: Volles Sortiment, voller Service.
Über 50 verschiedene Edelstahlqualitäten ab eigenem Lager!

Name: Minerals Nature
Description:
Rocks, minerals, and gemstones, the quiet designers of the Earth’s crust, hold inside them the mysteries of our planet’s topographical history. Drawing in with these old developments can rise above simple interest and advance into a satisfying and vivid leisure activity. The quest for gathering and concentrating on rocks and minerals not just opens a window into the World’s past but also gives lovers the potential chance to leave on intriguing excursions to remarkable land destinations.

This dazzling side interest is an agreeable mix of experience, examination, and association. Making a trip to various districts looking for interesting examples turns into an exhilarating part of the stone and mineral gatherer’s excursion. Whether it’s investigating stowed-away caverns, scaling rough precipices, or filtering through riverbeds, every endeavor guarantees the possibility of finding nature’s secret fortunes.

Name: M&M Recycling
Description:
M&M Recycling is a family-owned scrap metal recycling company committed to recycling Ferrous & Non-Ferrous metals. With decades of experience and a reputation built on trust, we specialize in buying, processing, and selling both ferrous and non-ferrous metals across domestic and international markets.

As a family business, we take pride in building lasting relationships—with our employees, customers, suppliers, and communities. We treat every transaction with honesty, every partnership with respect, and every challenge as an opportunity to grow together.

Our operations are designed for efficiency and environmental responsibility. From advanced metal sorting and processing equipment to expert logistics and compliance teams, M&M Recycling delivers high-quality recycled materials to foundries, mills, and manufacturers around the globe.

We work with a wide range of clients—from industrial manufacturers and demolition companies to small businesses and individuals—offering fair, transparent pricing and customized recycling solutions. Whether you're cleaning out a job site or sourcing large volumes of scrap for production, we bring the same level of service, speed, and professionalism.

Sustainability is at the heart of what we do. Every pound of scrap we recycle helps reduce the need for mining, conserves energy, and supports a cleaner, more circular economy.

At M&M Recycling, we’re not just in the scrap metal business—we’re in the business of building a better future, one load at a time.

Name: Baysal Metal Paslanmaz
Description:
Baysal Metal, temeli Perşembe Pazarı’na dayanan ticaret ve hizmet tecrübesinin ürünü olarak 1993'ten beri paslanmaz çelik sektöründe hizmet vermekte olan bir aile şirketidir.
 
Firmamız ilk yıllarında Metal İş Merkezi’nde pirinç, bakır, çinko, alüminyum ve her türlü inşaat malzemesinin tedariğini gerçekleştirmiştir. İlerleyen yıllarda ise satış içeriğini değiştirip paslanmaz ürün satışına başlamıştır.
 
1997 yılında Des Sanayi Sitesi’ne geçiş yaparak büyüme yolundaki ilk eylemini gerçekleştiren firmamız, 2001 yılında kurumsallaşma adına bir adım atarak aynı sektör içinde “Baysal Metal Ticaret Limited Şirketi” adı ile piyasadaki meydan okumasına güçlenerek devam etmiştir.

Paslanmaz çelik, günümüz şartlarında inşaattan makine imalatına, sağlıktan gıdaya, ulaşımdan üretime kadar hemen hemen her sektörde ihtiyaç duyulan değerli bir alaşımdır.
     
Her sektörde sürekliliğin en verimli şekilde devam edebilmesi için ihtiyaç duyulan en ufak gereksinimin dahi yeterli bir oranda sağlanması gerektiğini düşünüyoruz.   

Baysal Metal ailesi olarak kuruluş amacımız; piyasaya öncülük edebilecek uluslararası normlara uygun kalite ve standartlara sahip malzemeleri, talep edilen sektörlere müşteri memnuniyetini değişmez bir hedef olarak esas alarak temin  edebilmektir.
 
Biz daima çalışanlarımız, kurucularımız ve iş ortaklarımız ile bir bütün oluşturmayı hedefledik. Aile olgusunu temel karakterimiz yaparak piyasadaki yerimizi yukarılara taşıdık ve Baysal Metal ailesi olarak büyümeyi sürdüreceğiz.
 
“Üstün Müşteri Memnuniyeti” parolası ile çıktığımız bu yolda; ithalat, ihracat ve büyüyen iş hacmine bağlı stokta çeşitlilik rekabetine devam ederek, gelecekte de birinci sınıf malzeme kalitesi ve profesyonel iş titizliği ile sizlere hizmet etmeye devam edeceğiz.

Name: TECNOACCIAI
Description:
Quella di Tecnoacciai è una storia che viene da lontano. Una visione d'impresa nata dalla straordinaria lungimiranza della famiglia Bevilacqua e, nella sua esegesi iniziale, dal coraggio del suo precursore, il dott. Savino Bevilacqua. Fu lui a capitalizzare con entusiasmo l'esperienza maturata in questi ambienti già nei primi anni '50. 

Per colmare un vuoto determinatosi nella distribuzione degli acciai speciali e inossidabili destinati all’industria meccanica, nel 1984, nasce in terra di Bari, Tecnoacciai, oggi prestigiosa realtà di settore.

Nel tempo professionalità, innovazione continua, scrupolosa ricerca dei materiali, hanno portato questa industria ad essere un riferimento di eccellenza e di grande affidabilità nel campo della lavorazione e della commercializzazione di acciai speciali ed inossidabili laminati, fucinati, trafilati, pelati e rettificati.

In questi quasi 30 anni la sensibilità alle esigenze qualitative dei propri clienti e la visione gestionale seguita dall'amministratore, ing. Paolo Bevilacqua, le ha consentito di affermarsi autorevolmente sul mercato regionale, quale partner ideale al servizio dell’industria meccanica, della carpenteria inossidabile e dell’impiantistica, nella più ampia area d’utenza del mercato centromeridionale.

Una realtà in forte crescita grazie alla tensione del suo direttore verso una costante ricerca di nuovi prodotti e servizi che potessero portare sempre più alti valori aggiunti ai propri clienti e alla propria attività.
A questo proposito, per offrire al proprio mercato una gamma di metalli ferrosi completa di tutto, l'ing. Bevilacqua decide di rilevare il Centro Siderurgico Pugliese (CESIP) di Crispiano (TA), azienda nata un anno prima per volontà di due esperti venditori con esperienza pluriennale nella vendita di prodotti siderurgici. Nel 2013 decide di trasferirla a Bari per ottimizzazioni logistiche e commerciali.

Name: Autocycling - Quanttum Materials R&D -

Recyclage & Valorisation des métaux rares issus des catalyseurs

Name: TMP Metals Group, Ltd.
Description:
TMP Metals Group, Ltd. is a US based Corporation headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. The company refines, distributes, trades and tokenizes base metals and precious metals throughout North America, Latin America and South America. TMP Metals focuses primarily on metals that are essential for the development of a low-carbon economy and green transport. The company is one of the largest independent suppliers of high-grade nickel and platinum group metals in the world. TMP Metals Group formerly operated as Nornickel USA, Inc. and has been engaged in the metals industry as the exclusive distributor in the Americas for Norilsk Nickel for more than 25 years. The company was rebranded as the TMP Metals Group after Nornickel USA was acquired by the metals subsidiary of TMP Holdings, Inc. on July 15, 2023.

TMP Metals is the market leader throughout the Americas as a refiner and supplier of Nickel and Palladium. We are also one of the leading refiners and suppliers of Platinum(Pt), Rhodium(Rh), Copper(Cu), and Cobalt(Co) in the USA, Mexico and Brazil. In addition, the company refines and distributes Gold(Au), Silver(Ag), Iridium(Ir), Selenium(Se), Ruthenium(Ru), Tellurium(Te) and Sulphur(S) for industrial use.

We are committed to conducting our operations responsibly and sustainably. Ethical practices, environmental stewardship, and social responsibility are at the core of our operations. When you choose TMP Metals Group as your trade partner, you can be assured that your supply chain aligns with the highest standards. Our dedication to excellence, reliability, and sustainability ensures that you achieve your business objectives with confidence.

Mr. Ghulam Qadir, alongside his brother, Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, embraced the family tradition, dedicating themselves to the art and business of fine minerals.

The family’s expertise grew further with the establishment of Fine Art Gems by their younger brother, Mr. Ghulam Murtaza. Specializing in cut gemstones, rough gem-quality stones, and exquisite jewelry, Fine Art Gems added a new dimension to our family’s journey, expanding our reach and offerings to new horizons.

With a dedicated team of over 100 passionate individuals, we uphold a tradition of excellence, showcasing our collections at prestigious exhibitions across the globe. These include the Tucson Gem & Mineral Show, Westward Look Show, Denver Gem & Mineral Show, The Munich Show, Sainte-Marie-Aux-Mines Show, Tokyo International Mineral Fair, Changsha Show, and many more.

At Fine Art Minerals, we invite you to explore the extraordinary world of mineral specimens and gemstones. Each piece in our collection tells a story of nature’s marvels, captured through human craftsmanship and presented to inspire awe and admiration.

Join us in celebrating the beauty and wonder of the earth's treasures. Discover Fine Art Minerals – where passion meets perfection.

Name: Bluemoon Group
Description:
En Bluemoon Group combinamos pasión, innovación y compromiso con la sustentabilidad para transformar desafíos en oportunidades. Fundados por Luis Ricigliano en 1977, comenzamos como un laboratorio dedicado al análisis, comercialización y recuperación de metales preciosos, una actividad que lo apasionó desde sus inicios.
El espíritu emprendedor de nuestro fundador nos llevó a ser pioneros en el refinamiento de metales preciosos en Argentina, trayendo tecnología de punta al país y marcando un antes y un después en la industria. Este enfoque visionario se amplió hacia nuevas áreas, creando marcas líderes como Bluemoon, Rodhio, Urban Resource y LR Strategic Mining, todas enfocadas en el aprovechamiento y transformación de recursos naturales, residuales y urbanos.
Hoy, Bluemoon Group es una de las plantas tecnológicas más avanzadas del Cono Sur, con una sólida trayectoria de más de cuatro décadas marcada por la superación, la innovación y un firme compromiso con el desarrollo sostenible. Nuestra misión es generar soluciones ambientales que garanticen un futuro más saludable y sustentable para las próximas generaciones.

Montalbetti è stata anche un precursore delle attività di dismissione industriale con conseguente gestione delle problematiche ambientali ed è diventata negli anni uno dei principali player nel settore del decommissioning. In quest’ottica la società si occupa, sin dagli anni settanta, della bonifica e recupero delle aree da dismettere ed annovera attualmente tra i suoi clienti le principali realtà attive a livello internazionale nei settori chimico e petrolchimico, energia, automotive, trasporti e cantieristica.

Name: Hamoon Stone Mine
Description:
The Dolomite mine of southern Amir Divan is located in the Jashak mountain range. The mineral mass in this mine is calculated at about 500 million tons, distributed over 164 hectares. It is worth noting that the excess of 50 million tons of these resources is ready for exploitation and processing after expert mining explosions. According to the geological investigations, the mineral resources of this region consist of Calcium and Magnesium, significantly, which could be used as raw materials in different industries. According to the comparative and field investigations, the resources in this mine have high quality in terms of the stone strength, mineral, and minimal stripping ratio. 

The ores of this mine have been utilized in major construction projects (i.e., constructing a wharf and breakwater at the LNG site in the South Pars region). Furthermore, the ores have been employed to advance the construction project of the Asia Aram pier and wharf in Kangan. . Likewise, the ores have been exported to Persian Gulf countries including Kuwait and Qatar to be employed in construction projects. It is approximately 180 nautical miles from the nearest loading wharf of Deyr port to Qatar.

The Southern Amir Divan mine has more than 30 ha of area, which is available for infrastructure and construction of industrial structures like a crusher. Therefore, the products could be stored in significant quantities and diversity (various types of ores and granulations) in this zone. Moreover, the ores and other resources of this mine are accessible via three passages, which allows 3-4 contractor teams to start operating in this area, simultaneously.
Access to port wharves is crucial for any mineral resource. The southern Amir Divan Dolomite Mine is located in a strategic location with appropriate access to Laver, Deyr, and Kangan ports. This means that the ores, resources, and products could easily be exported to the Persian Gulf countries.

Name: Ridhi Sidhi Mineral Industries
Description:
About Ridhi Sidhi Mineral Industries 
Founded in 1990 by Mr. Jaswant Mal Mehta, Ridhi Sidhi Mineral Industries began as a small-scale operation with a clear vision – to provide quality bentonite products with trust and transparency. Over the years, the company has grown into a medium-scale enterprise, now ably carried forward by Mr. Pawan Mehta (LLB, M.Com), continuing the legacy of commitment and excellence.

We specialize in extraction and processing of Sodium Bentonite, sourced directly from our own mines in Barmer, Rajasthan – a region renowned worldwide for its high-quality bentonite reserves. Our operations are supported by two advanced processing plants in Barmer, where raw bentonite lumps are processed, refined, and packed with precision. Packaging is available in 25 kg, 50 kg, and customized sizes to meet client-specific needs.

Why Barmer is Important for Bentonite

Barmer is one of India’s richest belts for bentonite clay, known for its high swelling capacity, viscosity, and binding properties, making it highly demanded across industries. Its unique mineral composition makes Barmer bentonite stand out for both domestic and international applications.

Industries We Serve 
Our processed Sodium Bentonite Powder finds extensive use across a wide range of industries:

Oil & Gas Drilling – as a drilling mud for lubrication and cooling.

Iron Ore Pelletizing – as a binding agent.

Construction – for piling, waterproofing, and foundation works.

Fertilizers & Agriculture – as a soil conditioner and for controlled release of nutrients.

Foundries & Castings – as a molding sand binder.

Animal Feed & Other Industrial Uses – for various processing needs.

Our Reach:
We proudly serve clients across India and export to international markets including the Middle East, Nepal, Bangladesh, and beyond, building strong relationships with industries that rely on bentonite for their operations.

Our Values: Trust & Transparency ,Customer-centric, Continuous improvement

- Motoren- und Getriebetechnik: Verschleißfeste Komponenten wie Massenausgleichsgewichte

- Automobilindustrie: Kontakte, Sensoren, Steuergeräte

- Elektrotechnik und Elektronik: Kontakte, Schalter, Halbleiterträger

- Luft- und Raumfahrt: Hochtemperaturlegierungen (Wolfram, Niob), Düsen, Brennkammern

- Hochtemperaturanwendungen: Ofenbauteile, Heizleiter, Chargier-Träger, Schutzrohre und viele weitere

Wie wir Sie unterstützen:

- Erstberatung: Analyse Ihrer Anforderungen an Hochleistungswerkstoffen wie Molybdän oder Wolfram

Name: Georgia Recycling Group
Description:
We purchase ferrous & non-ferrous metals from both commercial & local customers. We strive to keep fair & competitive prices. 

From the time William Alewine and his wife began collecting scrap in a little red wagon in the 1940s, the need for scrap metals has only grown. They recognized the need for an aggregator in the area, and quickly expanded the business in 1949, purchasing Athens Auto Wrecking and one truck. By1968, Alewine relocated the company to Hull, where it has since flourished.  William’s grandson, Joe, and his wife, Kristie, purchased from him in 1999. It remains in the Alewine family today.

While the company was rebranded as Georgia Recycling Group in 2020, you can rest assured that our commitment to exceptional customer service, environmental consciousness, community outreach, and adherence to the founding principles remains unwavering, just as it has been since the 1940s, ensuring our continuous success in business.

Name: Abrasivos y Recubrimientos Industriales
Description:
Somos Abrasivos y Recubrimientos Industriales S.A.C., distribuidor especializado en abrasivos premium de garnet australiano, y atendemos a clientes industriales en toda Sudamérica. Ofrecemos un suministro confiable de garnet de alto rendimiento, ideal para procesos exigentes como el chorreo abrasivo, el corte por chorro de agua y la preparación de superficies, donde la calidad, la consistencia y la seguridad son fundamentales.

Con sede en Lurín, Perú, somos el distribuidor exclusivo de Australian Garnet en Perú, Ecuador y Bolivia. Nuestra alianza estratégica con esta empresa —una de las más avanzadas del mundo en la minería y procesamiento de garnet— nos permite ofrecer de forma continua un abrasivo de alta calidad, extraído de un único yacimiento aluvial en Lucky Bay, Australia Occidental.

La operación de vanguardia de Australian Garnet garantiza una granulometría uniforme, un proceso de producción controlado y un bajo contenido de polvo. Esto se traduce en un producto superior que mejora la productividad, reduce el desperdicio y promueve prácticas responsables con el medio ambiente. Nuestros abrasivos son la opción más confiable para profesionales en sectores como la construcción naval, la minería, la infraestructura, el petróleo y gas, y el mantenimiento de maquinaria pesada.

Nuestra misión es brindar soluciones abrasivas de alto desempeño junto con un servicio al cliente constante, acompañando el crecimiento del sector industrial sudamericano. Ya sea en la preparación de superficies para recubrimientos protectores o en cortes de precisión, proporcionamos tanto el abrasivo como el soporte técnico necesario para asegurar resultados consistentes y de alta calidad en cada proyecto.

No solo distribuimos abrasivos: estamos construyendo la cadena de suministro de garnet más confiable de Sudamérica.

Description:
About Us
We are a brokerage and consulting firm providing bespoke trade facilitation, strategic advisory, and market access solutions within the solid minerals sector. Positioned at the intersection of Africa’s resource wealth and the world’s demand for responsibly sourced minerals, we act as a trusted intermediary between verified mineral producers and qualified domestic and international buyers.

•	Mineral brokerage and buyer/seller agency representation
•	Strategic marketing of copper, gold, lithium, zinc, and manganese etc.
•	Regulatory compliance consulting and market entry facilitation
•	Deal sourcing, structuring, and execution
•	Transaction due diligence and verification services

With an expanding footprint across West, Central, and East Africa, and a growing portfolio of strategic alliances with global traders and off-takers, Nexora delivers measurable outcomes and builds enduring partnerships founded on integrity, reliability, and expertise.

 Our Mission
To facilitate transparent, ethical, and profitable mineral trade between African producers and global markets while ensuring sustainable value creation for all stakeholders.

To become Africa’s premier mineral exchange platform, globally recognized for integrity, expertise, and reliability in facilitating responsible and high-impact mineral transactions.

 Core Values
•	Integrity – Upholding the highest ethical standards in all engagements
•	Expertise – Applying deep sector knowledge to deliver optimal outcomes
•	Transparency – Promoting clarity, honesty, and openness in every transaction
•	Value Creation – Structuring deals that benefit all parties involved

Name: APIL Italy
Description: Fondata nel 1975, A.P.I.L. – Agglomeranti Pennelli Industriali nasce come azienda familiare per rispondere alla sempre più alta domanda del territorio di prodotti affidabili e di alta qualità. Continuando a mantenere i suoi solidi valori, dopo aver lasciato la produzione dei pennelli, l’azienda si è affermata da ben 50 anni nel settore metallurgico italiano ed estero. Tra le poche aziende produttrici di sabbia rossa e di terre per fonderia ha lunga tradizione di qualità che le ha permesso di essere apprezzata dalle fonderie di tutto il mondo. Oggi APIL è un punto di riferimento per la produzione di sabbia per formatura destinata alle fonderie di leghe leggere e di vernice refrattaria per tubi centrifugati in acciaio, prodotti apprezzati dalle grandi aziende e dalle realtà che richiedono i più alti standard qualitativi. Per rispondere in modo efficace alle esigenze dei clienti, l’azienda ha affiancato alla produzione industriale di sabbie e terre un’attività di selezione e vendita di una gamma sempre più ampia di prodotti per la fonderia. Questo consente alle aziende clienti di avere un unico interlocutore affidabile per tutte le loro necessità. Qualità, velocità di esecuzione, flessibilità, innovazione e attenzione alle esigenze dei clienti hanno reso APIL un partner di riferimento nel settore.

Działalność firmy opiera się w głównej mierze na obsłudze standardowych i nietypowych zapytań oraz zamówień z zakresu aluminium, miedzi, brązu, mosiądzu, żeliwa i stali nierdzewnej. 
Posiadamy blisko 25-letnie doświadczenie w branży w zakresie zakupów i sprzedaży metali. To sprawia, że możemy sprawnie zareagować nawet na najbardziej nietypowe zapytania. Naszym atutem jest szeroka wiedza o ofercie dostawców z terenu całej Europy.  Chętnie doradzimy w kwestii doboru gatunku, wymiaru, czy też alternatywnych możliwości realizacji zamówienia. 

W związku z dynamicznym rozwojem firmy doskonalimy nasze umiejętności i podnosimy kwalifikacje tak, aby w jak największym stopniu spełniać Państwa oczekiwania.
Wyrażamy przekonanie, iż współpraca z naszą firmą przyniesie Państwu wymierne korzyści.
Naszą specjalizacją są produkty takie jak:
•	blachy lakierowane,
•	profile aluminiowe cienkościenne, 
•	tuleje brązowe,
•	pręty i rury/ tuleje ze specjalnych stopów miedzi (np. CuCr1Zr),
•	taśmy miedziane/ brązowe/ mosiężne,
•	pręty i tuleje żeliwne,
•	formatki. 
  Na życzenie klientów dostarczamy towar z deklaracją zgodności oraz wymaganymi certyfikatami. Proponujemy Państwu dogodne warunki sprzedaży, przy współpracy ze stałymi klientami uzgadniamy indywidualne warunki dotyczące rabatów i terminów płatności.

Description:
We are Buta Steel Company LLC, the largest metallurgical company in Caucasus, which was established in 2001 and has proven itself in the European economy. We always keep ahead by applying innovative technologies and equipment. It is no coincidence that we have replaced our furnace with a new Siemens VAI furnace that meets modern standards.

---Company Profile
We are Buta Steel Company LLC, the largest metallurgical company in Europe, which was established in 2001 and has proven itself in the European economy. It has from the very first days of its operation been focused on innovations and quality, continuously increasing its production capacity and maintaining its competitive capability. Continuously expanding its business scope, the Company has two electric arc furnaces and three rolling lines, with the annual steel production capacity reaching 1,000,000 tonnes (one million tonnes).

In 2010 BSC was completely renovated and now manufactures a wide range of products such as rebars, square billets, round billets, channels, rolled wire, angle bars, I-beams, and square and round rods, and various types of castings. By maximizing the automation of its production processes the Company prevents potential accidents resulting from human errors, accelerates production, and ensures high-quality products.

The Company management also places great value on environmental protection, which has led to the complete renovation of the Gas/Dust Catcher to ensure fully automated removal of dust and polluted air generated from the production process, thus preventing pollution of the environment.

Our production is the strength that we gain from the properly formulated policy and correction actions.

Name: AEROPROMSTEEL MMC
Description:
Основными направлениями деятельности компании являются цветной и нержавеющий металлопрокат. Сортамент нашей продукции насчитывает свыше 8 000 типоразмеров изделий из нержавеющей стали, титана, алюминия, меди, бронзы, латуни, свинца, олова, марганца, нихрома, а так же различных сплавов. Трубный и сортовой металлопрокат, листы, полосы, ленты, проволоки и множество других изделий из более чем 1500 марок стали и сплавов сконцентрировала компания на своих складах в Азербайджане.

Высокопрофессиональные и внимательные к каждому клиенту менеджеры компании с готовностью помогут подобрать нужный типоразмер проката, оптимально соответствующий поставленной задаче, а кроме того, организуют оперативную доставку автомобильным, железнодорожным, авиа и водным транспортом (в том числе почтово-багажными вагонами, сборными машинами, контейнерами, догрузом). Ответственность наших сотрудников является надежной гарантией минимизации транспортных издержек и получения продукции в кратчайшие сроки.

Помимо высокого качества металлопроката и сервиса международного уровня, к преимуществам компании следует так же отнести гибкие условия оплаты, предусматривающие систему скидок и возможность приобретать металлопрокат в кредит. Мы предлагаем своим партнерам только сертифицированную продукцию ведущих отечественных и мировых производителей, которая соответствует современным стандартам и нормам экологической безопасности.

Мы всегда на пути к своим клиентам!

Name: AltaTerra Resources
Description:
At AltaTerra Resources, our mission is simple but powerful:
To connect Latin America’s mineral wealth with the world’s most demanding and responsible markets.

We operate as a strategic bridge between producers, investors, and global off-takers, creating transparent, sustainable, and high-value mineral trading and development opportunities.

Based in Peru — one of the world’s most resource-rich countries — AltaTerra focuses on three key pillars:

First, Integrity and Compliance.
Every transaction we structure meets the highest international standards for traceability, ESG, and regulatory compliance. We believe that responsible sourcing is not a trend, but the future of global trade.

Second, Strategic Partnerships.
We work alongside mining operators, logistics providers, and global refiners to deliver efficient, secure, and ethical supply chains — connecting origin and destination through trust.

And third, Value Creation.
Our goal is not just to move commodities, but to generate long-term value — for our partners, for local communities, and for the environment.

Whether we are representing global buyers, supporting local producers, or developing cross-border investment projects, AltaTerra Resources stands for transparency, reliability, and global reach — grounded in local expertise.

Global reach. Grounded value.
That’s AltaTerra Resources.

Description:
Our Story – T-KA108: Purity of Homes
Founded in 2022, T-KA108 was born out of a deep passion for home decor and sacred puja articles. What started as a humble dream quickly transformed into a dedicated D2C (Direct-to-Consumer) brand focused on bringing purity, elegance, and spiritual essence into every Indian household.

We proudly call our journey "Project TKA" — a mission to blend tradition with trust, devotion with design.

In our early days, we began with just 100–200 customers a month, driven solely by our commitment to delivering premium quality and authenticity. We didn’t chase numbers—we chased perfection. Every product was designed and curated after extensive market research, customer feedback, and relentless R&D, ensuring we met not just expectations, but emotions.

With each passing month, we listened more, learned more, and improved more. We focused solely on what truly matters: understanding our customers’ needs, maintaining high product standards, and preserving the cultural and spiritual significance behind every article we create.

Thanks to the trust and love of our growing family, T-KA108 has now proudly crossed 45,000+ satisfied customers. We are honored to be recognized as a Gold Seller and Trusted Brand by Flipkart, a milestone that motivates us to aim even higher.

Our journey so far has been nothing short of divine—blessed by the grace of God and the unwavering support of our customers. Each step forward is a tribute to the values we stand for: purity, trust, tradition, and quality.

This is just the beginning. At T-KA108, we remain fully committed to serving your home and spiritual space with the best we can offer—day by day, product by product, prayer by prayer.

T-KA108 – Purity of Homes. Rooted in tradition. Driven by devotion. Growing with grace.

Our journey of exploration and innovation has just begun, and we're inviting investors to join us on this remarkable trajectory. Here's a glimpse of what lies ahead:

With an ambitious vision to unlock the hidden treasures within 500-600 hectares of our mining territory, we're gearing up for detailed geology and drilling endeavors. Guided by the insights from the geophysics of polarized induction studies, we aim to unearth extensive reserves of copper and gold. This will involve drilling 10,000 meters with core recovery, propelling us into new realms of resource abundance.

Promin La Roca is poised to revolutionize the extraction process with the forthcoming purchase and installation of leaching and flotation plants. These advanced facilities will unravel the potential of copper, silver, and gold metals within our mineral wealth. The precise investment parameters will be determined post-drilling, informed by the composition of oxides and sulfides.

Our journey doesn't halt with these milestones. We're dedicated to extending exploration initiatives across the entirety of our mining property. This commitment ensures that the horizons of discovery and opportunity remain boundless.

Invest in the Future with Promin La Roca.

Join us in shaping the future of mining by investing in Promin La Roca. With a proven history, a prime location, and a clear roadmap for expansion and innovation, we're inviting you to become a part of our story. Let's redefine the mining landscape together.

What is Automotive Cores, What is our business?

Auto cores are junk automotive parts used for rebuilding or scrap metal. What is our business? Basically we're a recycling company that specializes in junk auto parts. We've been doing the green thing back before it was cool. 

We buy Junk auto parts whether they work or not including catalytic converters, motors, transmissions, alternators, starters, power steering pumps, brake boosters, radiators, car batteries, car rims, just to name a few!

Darunter fällt der An- und Verkauf von Aluminium Schrotten, verschiedene Kupfer Qualitäten, Eisenschrotten, Elektroschrotten, Müllverbrennungsschrotten, metallhaltige Restfraktionen, diverse NE- und Sonderfraktionen. Fundada en 1940 por Sune Schröder, nuestra compañía se ha consolidado como pionera en la introducción en España de aceros procedentes de las mejores acerías de Europa, marcando un antes y un después en la distribución de tubos y barras para usos mecánicos, hidráulicos, estructurales e industriales. Con más de 80 años de experiencia y tres generaciones familiares al frente, seguimos creciendo con la misma vocación de servicio y mejora continua que nos caracteriza desde el inicio.

Nuestro catálogo ofrece una de las gamas más amplias del mercado: aceros al carbono para mecánica (Eurotubo, Ducal, Rulon, Precitubo, Eurobarra, Perlit), hidráulica (Circuit, Esco-8, Esco-10, Vasla, Vasladur, Vaslatop, Vaslainox, Vaslatub) y estructuras (Mecatubo, Plecal, Anglecal). A ello se suma una completa línea de aceros inoxidables (Euroinox, Inoxtub, Durinox, BM Inox 310, pletinas, cuadrados y hexagonales), junto con rodamientos especiales bajo la marca Rodur, orientados a sectores como la automoción, energía, química, naval, alimentación y construcción.

Más allá del producto, nuestro compromiso es el servicio. Disponemos de un stock permanente de más de 4.500 toneladas, garantizamos corte a medida con precisión CNC en diámetros de hasta 660 mm, y entregamos en 24/48 horas gracias a una logística optimizada. Ofrecemos un acompañamiento cercano y profesional, convencidos de que no existe cliente pequeño y de que cada proyecto merece la máxima exigencia.

Hoy, Grupo Schröder y Staler forman una única fuerza: tradición e innovación al servicio de la industria. Nuestro reto seguirá siendo siempre el mismo: aportar rigor, calidad y soluciones personalizadas que conviertan al acero en la base de grandes proyectos.

Name: Crown Steel
Description:
Crown Steel Traders: Your Trusted Partner for Steel

About Us: We are a steel trading company having vast network of steel sources, procuring  various grades of steel and, related products and services for our customers.

Product Range:

Steel Types:
Crown Steel deals in a variety of steel types, including:
1. Carbon Steel: An alloy of iron and carbon, available in low-carbon and high-carbon grades.  Major grades: 1010, 1018, ST52, A105, 1020, C45, C55, C60 
2. Alloy Steel: Combining iron with other elements (chromium, nickel, etc.) for enhanced properties. Major Grades: 4130, 4140, EN19, 4145H, 4340, EN24, 52100, EN31, EN36, EN353, 8620, 18CrNiMo7, EN29B
3. Stainless Steel: Resistant to corrosion, ideal for various applications. Major Grades: 304, 310, 316, 316L, 410, 416, 440C

Steel Types by Manufacturing Process :
Crown Steel deals in a variety of steel types as follows:
1. Forged Steel: Steels with fine and uniform grain structure resulting in higher strength and reliability. 
2. Hot Rolled Steel: Steels with a non uniform grain structure resulting in lower strength compared to forged steel.
3. Continuous Cast Steel: These steels are produced by continuous solidification of molten metals into semi finished billet, bloom or slab. These steels have low mechanical qualities and  serve as raw material for further processing by hot rolling or forging.  
4. Cast Ingots: These steels are similar to continuous cast steels only difference being that they are solidified in moulds. These steels are mainly serve as raw materials for forging large sections of steel.

Products:

1. Raw Materials: Carbon, Alloy and Stainless Steel Round, Square, Flat, Hex bars

2. Some Custom Forged and Machined Items:
a) Spur, Helical, Bevel, Rack and Pinion Gears
b) Gantry Crane Wheels
c) Die Blocks for Moulding Dies
d) Guillotine blades for Rolling Mills
e) Flanges for Oil Exploration Sector
f) Forklift Forks
g) Shredder Blades for Metal, Plastic, Palm
h) Diamond Faceting Scaife

Name: Kanishk Impex Ltd
Description:
KANISHK IMPEX was founded in April 2021 with the sole aim of facilitating UK buyers and Indian manufacturers working in the brass and metal industry.
Any wholesale buyer in the UK importing goods from overseas would look for the quality of the products i.e., EN or BS standard and difficulties faces by most of those buyers are different in time zone, currency, and exchange rate e.g., exchange rate would be different when the deal was agreed, initial payment or parts of payments made and when goods delivered and lastly when goods reach to the market. The legal environment plays a vital role as the local laws and regulation doesn’t protect buyers while importing goods from overseas and it becomes a gamble while cracking a deal overseas as there is no legal protection and there are loads of horror stories out there where buyers have not been delivered what was agreed initially or time frame not followed in delivering goods and which causes a serious loss to buyer. These problems make it hard for buyers to go across the ocean and buy products. But what if all the above questions are answered locally!
KANISHK IMPEX came up with solutions to all these problems faced in the UK as a buyer. We partnered with the big manufacturers in India most of them are already exporting in countries like South Africa, Europe and USA which has equivalent to EN/BS standard and as we partnered with them, we promise to deliver the same goods and service locally in the UK according to UK’s legal framework. The buyer will be provided with concrete information regarding when the goods left India and reached the UK and when it is on the way to the buyers’ factory. It means a buyer will be importing goods from India, but all the processes will be as if the buyer is dealing with a local manufacturer and still getting a competitive price on the goods. KANISHK IMPEX will look after all the processes from the order placing, transactions to delivery to the factory in the UK.

Name: AGE Global Trading DRC SARL
Description:
Clean Gold Supply Chain Transparency

AGE Global Trading is a licensed gold comptoir company based in the Democratic Republic of Congo with offices in Kinshasa, Ituri and Lubumbashi. We specialize in the purchase, selling, and exporting of Clean Gold in the artisanal and small-scale mining (ASM) industry.

We bring 21st century supply chain transparency to the international precious metals industry, ensuring rigorous adherence to the Clean Gold Initiative.

Our proprietary chain of custody system manages gold sourcing in high-risk areas establishing our firm commitment to compliance with all relevant provisions of international laws and regulations. 

Clean Gold means not only conflict-free, but free of child labor and refined in an environmentally friendly manner that exceeds industry best practices. We also promote supply chain transparency through oversight of both upstream and downstream actors, communicating openly with local, municipal, regional, and international stakeholders.

AGE developed The Clean Gold Initiative to establish mineral supply chains that are 100% legal, conflict-free, and free of human rights abuses. Please read The Clean Gold Initiative at https://www.ageglobaltrading.com. 

We pride ourselves on the social economic impact that our efforts bring to the families in the artisanal and small-scale mining (ASM) communities. AGE Global Trading provides financial support to ASM communities in the Democratic Republic of Congo, helping them to become licensed with the relevant authorities to sell their products to international markets, and ultimately bringing peace, prosperity and economic stability to their region. Without this support, it is extremely challenging for small mines to access legal markets. As a result, these mines often sell to informal markets, fueling illicit activities and local conflicts. The support our company provides solves these problems and produces a positive social impact to the families of the communities.

Name: intlzeoliteconf.iran
Description:
In recent decades, Zeolite, a natural material, has found a variety of applications in fields such as absorption, catalysis, construction, agriculture, soil remediation, and energy. Semnan University, in collaboration with the Iranian Chemical Society, is proud to host the eighth Zeolite Conference on September 19th and 20th, 2023. The conference will focus on diverse themes including energy, nanotechnology, environmental science, biotechnology, catalysts, sensors, separation processes, computational studies, petrochemicals, refining, detection technologies, purification, extraction, and value addition. 
The objective of this gathering is to foster dialogue and information exchange about the latest advancements in the field of zeolites and porous materials, and to create opportunities for collaborative efforts between industry professionals and researchers, aimed at the advancement and self-reliance of our country. Therefore, we invite all interested industry leaders, professors, students, and researchers in this domain to participate in the eighth Zeolite Conference.

Name: Aços América Latina
Description:
A Aços América Latina é uma empresa comprometida em fornecer soluções de alta qualidade no mercado de aço, atendendo demandas de setores como construção civil, indústria automotiva, energia e infraestrutura. Nossa missão é transformar o futuro, promovendo inovação, sustentabilidade e excelência em cada projeto entregue.

Com uma visão orientada para o cliente, atuamos como parceiros estratégicos, oferecendo produtos e serviços que atendem às necessidades específicas de cada cliente. Entendemos que o aço é mais do que um material; é um elemento essencial para o progresso econômico, social e tecnológico. Por isso, trabalhamos para entregar soluções que impactem positivamente nossos clientes e a sociedade.

Nossos diferenciais incluem:

Qualidade Superior: Garantimos rigorosos padrões de qualidade em nossos produtos e processos, com foco na durabilidade e desempenho.
Atendimento Personalizado: Entendemos que cada cliente é único e oferecemos um atendimento consultivo para desenvolver soluções sob medida.
Sustentabilidade: Incorporamos práticas sustentáveis em nossa operação, contribuindo para um futuro mais verde com processos que priorizam eficiência energética e reciclagem.
Inovação Contínua: Investimos continuamente em tecnologia e pesquisa para oferecer produtos e serviços alinhados às tendências globais do setor.
Nosso compromisso vai além do fornecimento de aço. Buscamos ser agentes de transformação, apoiando o crescimento de empresas e projetos em toda a América Latina. Nossa equipe capacitada e infraestrutura robusta nos permitem atender desde pequenas empresas até grandes indústrias, sempre com agilidade e confiabilidade.

Estamos prontos para construir o futuro ao seu lado. Seja você um empreendedor buscando soluções específicas ou uma grande corporação necessitando de um parceiro estratégico, a Aços América Latina é a escolha certa para superar desafios e alcançar novos patamares de sucesso.

Conecte-se conosco e descubra como agregamos valor ao seu negócio!

Name: Suricate SARL
Description: SURICATE is a Mauritanian group specialized in exploring strategic minerals in Mauritania. They focus on areas rich in gold, iron ore, barium, lithium, and high purity quartz through ambitious exploration projects. Their operations primarily target the TASIAST-TIJIRIT greenstone belts of the REGUIBAT shield, akin to the renowned KINROSS Tasiast gold mine, a major gold-producing region globally. The region's geological characteristics, including pegmatitic muscovite-granite intrusions, suggest abundant lithium, strontium, and beryllium minerals, notably Spodumene and Lepidolite. Their exploration efforts have identified numerous quartzofeldspathic pegmatites, indicating substantial economic potential with significant quantities of beryl and low-iron Spodumene and Lepidolite, reinforcing the area's mineral richness.

Taiwan is a steel powerhouse as one of the largest producers of steel in the world. Name: Trustmet International
Description:
Trustmet is an Indian company focused on sourcing aluminium scrap for large industrial applications, which has allowed us to create long-lasting relationships by interacting directly with legitimate suppliers from the U.S., Canada and Europe. We are committed to being a transparent and documented supplier, so we operate under the philosophy that credibility comes before transactions.

The Trustmet team uses a systematic approach when evaluating materials for purchase, as we look at grade, product origin, compliance, and shipping routes. If we find that the material meets our customers' specifications, we act quickly to provide a solution. Our ultimate goal is not just to sell products one time; it's to develop a continuous and repeatable supply chain that our customers can rely on month after month.

We provide a simple purchasing process that employs an efficient communication format and fast decision-making. A supplier gives us scrap information, such as grade, quantity, area photographs, and estimated pricing. Our team evaluates the material against its specifications, degree of contamination, and export readiness. If the product is acceptable, we conduct a yard visit/virtual inspection to confirm the quality before we place the order. Once the material is confirmed, we agree on terms, produce documents, and arrange shipping for at least 25 tons worth of containerized cargo at one time. Our goal is to verify accurately, make rapid decisions, and ship materials promptly.

Description:

Abrimos nuestras puertas por primera vez en 1996 en Urdaneta, ZARAUTZ (Guipúzcoa), para trabajar el corte de chapas por chorro de agua. Desde entonces, hemos cortado piezas por laser, oxicorte y plasma, nos hemos traspasado a unas instalaciones más grandes en AIA-ORIO (Gipuzkoa) y hemos apostado por la última tecnología en corte por plasma de alta definición, oxicorte, y en transporte propio para ofrecer un servicio de calidad, a buen precio y de forma ágil.

Estratégicamente situados en un pabellón de 1.500 metros cuadrados en AIA – ORIO, Gipuzkoa, en URLAN poseemos una capacidad de producción considerable, con lo que podemos ofrecer un servicio de corte de chapa según plano ágil, y transporte de piezas a empresas de Gipuzkoa, Bizkaia, Araba, La Rioja, Burgos o Cantabria. También exportamos a Francia.

Gracias a los nuevos avances tecnológicos y a nuestro afán de mejora continua, satisfacemos las exigencias de nuestros clientes, siendo siempre respetuosos con el medio ambiente.

Name: Geneva-Liberty Steel
Description:
“Our story” is a simple one. It dates back to the mid 1950’s and a humble start as a small stamping house located in Youngstown, Ohio. In those days Youngstown was really a “Steel Town”, halfway between Cleveland, Ohio and Pittsburgh, PA in the “Steel Valley”. Manufacturing was growing in the North- East and the decision was made to move away from “Stamping” and into “Shearing” and “Supplying” steel.

Over the decades, more shears, cut to length lines, multi-blanking lines and locations have been added but one thing has never changed: “GLS” since the 50’s known as “Rowan Stamping” or the 70’s & 80’s known as “Geneva Steel Blanking” to the present, has always been about “Service”. We’ve become known as a company that’s flexible, that listen’s to our customers and works hard to make purchasing steel easier. Whether you’re an OEM or Metal Fabricator, Large or Small, your business is important to us. Youngstown Ohio is still melting steel. In fact it’s revitalizing and we’re doing our part too. So feel free to give us a call, we’d be happy to hear from you.

Name: KBNM Metals Private Limited, India
Description:
A metal compound and metal ingots trading company, that specializes in the buying, selling, and trading of various types of metal compounds and metal ingots. Metal ingots are blocks of pure metal that have been cast into a standardized shape for use in various industrial applications. Metal compounds, on the other hand, are created by combining metals with other elements to form new chemical compounds that possess specific properties and characteristics.

Metal compound and metal ingots companies are involved in the supply chain of the metals and materials industries. They typically purchase metal compounds and ingots from producers or other suppliers and sell them to manufacturers, construction companies, and other end-users. These companies may also provide value-added services, such as custom processing or fabrication of metal ingots, to meet the specific needs of their clients.

Our company operates globally, while focusing on specific regions or markets, play an important role in the metal industry by facilitating the movement of raw materials and finished products between producers and consumers.

Name: ARIES REFINERY PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Founded in 2021, Aries Refinery has quickly established itself as a leader in the precious metals industry, combining age-old refining techniques with state-of-the-art technologies. 

With a legacy built on expertise, precision, and a commitment to excellence, we specialize in transforming raw ore into gold of exceptional purity. Our dedication to craftsmanship and innovation ensures that every piece of refined gold meets the highest standards of quality. At Aries Refinery, we view every partnership as an opportunity to build lasting relationships. Whether you’re a miner entrusting us with your raw materials or a collector seeking the finest bullion, we are committed to serving as your trusted collaborator. More than just a refinery, Aries Refinery is your partner in the world of precious metals—where the alchemy of tradition is perfectly blended with the precision of modern technology. Join us on this journey, and experience the brilliance of unparalleled quality.

At Aries Refinery, our journey began with a vision — to redefine gold refining in India with integrity, innovation, and uncompromising quality. From humble beginnings, we’ve grown into a trusted name in the precious metals industry, driven by our commitment to transparency, ethical sourcing, and cutting-edge technology.

Over the years, we’ve built a state-of-the-art facility, earned NABL and BIS accreditations, and established a reliable supply chain spanning mines, recyclers, and brokers. Every step of our growth reflects our dedication to excellence and our belief that purity is more than a standard — it’s a promise.

As we continue to evolve, Aries Refinery remains focused on delivering refined value, building trust, and setting new benchmarks in the gold refining landscape of India.

Name: Gold Equity Investments
Description:
Why Invest In Gold?

1. Gold is a Safe Haven in Uncertain Times:
In a volatile economy, gold remains one of the most trusted stores of value. While currencies fluctuate and markets dip, gold holds its ground—and often rises when everything else falls.

2. Hedge Against Inflation:
As inflation eats away at the value of cash, gold acts as a powerful hedge. It has historically outperformed fiat currencies during inflationary periods, preserving purchasing power.

3. Limited Supply, Growing Demand:
Gold is finite—it can’t be printed or artificially inflated. With rising global demand from central banks, investors, and industries, the supply-demand imbalance is pushing prices upward.

4. Portfolio Diversification
Smart investors know: don’t put all your eggs in one basket. Gold adds stability and balance to any portfolio, reducing overall risk and increasing long-term resilience.

5. Liquidity and Global Acceptance:
Gold is universally recognized and easily liquidated. Whether you're in Sydney, Singapore, or San Francisco, gold is money—and always will be.

Bottom Line:
In this economy, gold isn’t just a purchase—it’s protection. It’s a strategic move to secure your wealth, hedge against uncertainty, and invest in something that has stood the test of time.

For more information please contact:

Carmen Parnos

Name: HongKong Trenda Co.,Limited
Description:
We are ISO9001/ISO 45001/IATF16949 and ROHS certified manufacturer of Copper-Aluminum Bimetal Composites materials.

And We are the publishing unit of the Chinese National Standard GB-T 32468-2015 of “Copper-aluminum Bimetal Composites Strips”.

Our Copper-Aluminum Bimetal Composites material is a plating of copper on aluminum. The two metals are combined together through our patented technology which we called Oxygen-free Semi-molten rolling compound technology. This technology solves the technical problems of oxidation and eutectic of copper-aluminum composite. 

The widely used copper-aluminum composite material concentrates the advantages of copper and aluminum, which not only has the advantages of copper such as high electrical and thermal conductivity, low contact resistance and beautiful appearance, but also has the advantages of light weight and corrosion resistance of aluminum. Therefore, Copper-aluminum composite materials are widely used in new energy vehicles, lithium batteries, Photovoltaic, communication base station, power equipment, electricity, heat transfer, and other industries.
 
Copper-Aluminum Composites strips/sheets can be made as busbars, lithium battery negative terminals, heat sink, filter cover for communication base station,etc.
 
Our products are hot sold to more than 20 provinces across the country, and also exported to The European Union, South Korea, Japan, USA, and other countries. 

Advantages of our Copper-Aluminum Bimetal Composites material :

1. Lower Weight due to lower density.

2. Lower cost due to larger volume.

3. Good electrical conductivity.

4. Good mechanical properties, easy for cutting/punching/bending/drilling, etc.

5. Simpler processing, good for Mass-production.
