Name: AnanthKuartz Inc.
Description:
Welcome to AnanthKuartz!
Your Trusted Source for High-Quality Minerals

Meet the Unsung Hero of Modern Life: Quartz
Quartz, the silent powerhouse, is everywhere. From the toothpaste you use to the floors you walk on, quartz is an indispensable part of our daily lives. This incredible mineral, composed of silicon and oxygen (SiO2), is the backbone of modern technology including this computer or mobile phone your are reading this.

The Magic of Quartz

Quartz's unique combination of silica and oxygen creates:

- oscillator (semi conductors) 
-Power generation (renewable energy) 
- Shockproof durability (medical) 
- Soundproof insulation
And many more incredible properties!

Omni-Present, Yet Underappreciated...

Quartz is the most abundant mineral on Earth's crust, found in various forms and shapes. AnanthKuartz is dedicated to unlocking its full potential.

Unlocking Quartz's Potential:

We deliver superior quartz solutions in various forms to meet your industrial needs with excellence and reliability.

Crystalline Quartz: Nature's Marvel

Crystalline quartz, or alpha-quartz, is a naturally occurring mineral composed of silicon and oxygen atoms (SiO2). It's one of Earth's most abundant minerals, found in igneous, metamorphic, and sedimentary rocks.

Key Properties of Crystalline Quartz

- High purity (up to 99.99% SiO2)
- Hexagonal crystal structure
- High hardness (7 on the Mohs scale)

Name: The Five Stooges Ltd
Description:
We specialize in supporting serious buyers who are coming to Africa to source gold by connecting them with credible sellers and offering expert guidance to avoid losses due to third-party scams.

With years of hands-on experience in both the gold trade and banking sectors, we confidently navigate clients through what many call “the gold jungle.” Every year, hundreds of new traders unknowingly lose millions of dollars to organized networks and fraudulent schemes across the continent. Our mission is to prevent that.

Our advisory and facilitation services are built on proven procedures that reduce risks and create a structured, transparent buying process. While our services come at a cost, the value lies in protection—ensuring your investment is secure, rather than lost to ruthless scammers.

We offer tailored service packages ranging from basic advisory to full concierge-style support. These include:

Pre-travel consultations and risk assessments

Airport pick-up and accommodation arrangements

Full escorting service to meetings

Private office space for negotiations

Contract drafting and legal vetting

Background checks on sellers

Payment arrangements and account setup

Export assistance

Optional personal security services

Our reach extends across multiple African countries, and we operate with professionalism, confidentiality, and integrity at every stage. If you're serious about entering the African gold trade safely and efficiently, we're here to support you from start to finish.

L'innovation et la qualité sont les piliers fondamentaux de notre travail.

Grâce à notre vaste expérience et à nos compétences techniques avancées, nous sommes en mesure de répondre efficacement aux exigences des clients. Nous nous efforçons de satisfaire nos clients en fournissant des produits de haute qualité, un excellent service client et en respectant les délais convenus.

Fonderiedkm est un partenaire fiable et digne de confiance dans l'industrie de la fonderie et de la fabrication d'acier. Nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions personnalisées et innovantes à nos clients, et nous visons l'excellence dans tous les aspects de notre activité.

Nous invitons les professionnels et les entreprises à découvrir les avantages de travailler avec Fonderiedkm et à nous contacter pour des besoins spécifiques dans le domaine de la fonderie et de la fabrication d'acier. Notre équipe compétente est prête à offrir des solutions sur mesure et à contribuer au succès de nos clients.

Name: Isaminas - Distribuição ArcelorMittal

Description:
Myst Trading Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based company specialising in the global trading of physical metals and concentrates with a key focus in the battery materials and base metals supply chains. The company sources, stores, and distributes materials across the value chain, from direct shipping ore to value-added products.
Myst Trading provides offtake and supply solutions with flexible payment, financing, and pricing terms. Leveraging deep expertise in derivatives markets, the company offers hedging support and structured pricing solutions to help clients manage financial risk. Additional services include tolling arrangements and financial solutions to optimize balance sheets, cash flows, and risk exposure.
Myst’s trading portfolio spans the entire value chain, from upstream raw materials to refined value-added products, covering Lithium, Tin, Recycled Materials (Black Mass, Cathode Powder, MHP Products), Tantalum, Niobium, and more.

Sản phẩm được sử dụng rộng rãi trong các lĩnh vực điện tử, viễn thông, hàng không vũ trụ, thiết bị y tế
Tất cả sản phẩm tại Bocast Việt Nam đều có thể xuất hóa đơn, giá cả thay đổi tùy theo quy cách, mẫu mã và số lượng, Vui lòng liên hệ bộ phân chăm sóc khách hàng để biết chi tiết.
Mô tả vật liệu
– PA66 (Nylon)
Có tính dẻo và khả năng chống cháy tốt (đạt chuẩn 94UL-V2), màu trắng hơi ngả vàng.
– PP (Polypropylene)
Có khả năng chịu nhiệt tốt, chống ăn mòn hóa chất tốt, màu trắng.
– PVC (Nhựa Polyvinyl Clorua cứng)
Chống ăn mòn và có khả năng chống thấm nước tốt, màu xám.
– PC (Polycarbonate)
Có tính cách điện tốt, chống oxy hóa tốt, màu trong suốt đẹp mắt.
– PVDF (Polyvinylidene Fluoride)
Độ bền cơ học cao, chịu nhiệt liên tục ở 150°C.
– PPS (Polyphenylene Sulfide)
Chịu nhiệt cực tốt, chống cháy, độ cứng cao.
